name: Read/Act News
subject: Biden announces MORE taxes...
body:
Learn how to diversify your retirement portfolio in a way that could shelter it from runaway inflation & hefty tax bills.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.

| | Joe Biden wasn't kidding when he said he wanted to raise taxes. He's trying to push through the largest set of tax increases since 1968... name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Targeting these 3 states
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
There are three vulnerable Democrat Senators that represent RED states who can be beaten in 2024\. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)
---
Fellow American,

For the last two years, my Republican colleagues and I have worked to block as much of the Biden agenda as we can, **but there's only so much we can do without holding the Senate majority.** While we were outraised and fell short of our goal in 2022, there are much better opportunities for us to take the Senate in 2024.

There are three states currently represented by Democrat senators that President Trump won - some by massive double-digit margins. Republicans should be able to win Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia in the next election **_IF_** we start preparing **_NOW_**.

The key to any victory is proper planning. Unfortunately, our Republican candidates weren't fully prepared last year to combat the mountain of money and blizzard of attacks from the Left. But we must learn from our mistakes, start early, and fully support our Republican nominees in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia THIS YEAR.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)
| [** INVEST EARLY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)
---

The preparation starts today - even before nominees have been elected - so they will have the resources need to win on DAY ONE.

That's why the Republican Party has set up Republican Nominee accounts in these critical states. The money raised today will be available to our Republican Senate nominees the moment they win the nomination from Republican voters. These war chests will help our Republican candidates take on incumbent Democrats who will have millions in the bank by then.

By contributing to the Republican Senate Nominee Funds for Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia TODAY, you will help Republicans be on equal footing with the Left from the start. [**Will you please chip in a SPLIT donation now to these three critical races and help us win back the Senate next year?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)

[** INVEST EARLY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)
---

We must get involved NOW and show our support for Republicans in these RED states.

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)

Lindsey Graham

P.S. Right now there are Republican Nominee Senate Accounts that have been set up to support whoever wins the Republican primaries in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia on DAY ONE. Your support today will help them flip these seats AND help us win back the Senate majority! [**Please chip in $5 or even $25 today!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)

[** INVEST EARLY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61492667:WRPueIDND:m:1:877327319:F82FF0B686B1413A2721C2FAFD1BAD40:r)

body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62316033:6f3CgDGKN:m:1:3331421248:9FDCF533A6624870E5541B83B950E21A:r)
---
| Peter,
My opponent, **Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz, invited a shocking "guest of honor"** to Biden's State of the Union...
...a pregnant woman who **fled Florida to get an illegal late-term abortion** in deep blue Washington, DC.
Debbie didn't bother to invite someone whose family was gutted by Far-Left policies...as fentanyl pours over the border, as crime surges, as food prices skyrocket.
No. She invited someone who crossed state lines to abort her own child.
Abortion is the highest sacrament of the Far-Left's toxic "religion." They don't view it as a necessary evil anymore...they view it as something to be proud of.
Think of how sick and twisted that is. Leaders like Joe Biden and Debbie Wasserman Schultz **think that women should be PROUD to murder their own children** because they're too inconvenient.
**We need to restore basic decency and strong values to America** , and it won't happen as long as Debbie Wasserman Schultz sits in office and pulls stunts like this.
I lost to her last November by a whisker...but in my district, I **_outperformed_** Ron DeSantis and won the **_highest percentage of votes_** of any Republican ever (without ANY Establishment support.)
With more resources, l WILL close the deal in 2024...**but we 've got to start early and for that I need your immediate help.**
**[Will you join the fight to end the career of Abortion Lovin' Deb with a gift of $25 or more?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62316034:6f3CgDGKN:m:1:3331421248:9FDCF533A6624870E5541B83B950E21A:r)** | | | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62316034:6f3CgDGKN:m:1:3331421248:9FDCF533A6624870E5541B83B950E21A:r)
---
Thank you!

Carla Spalding
Candidate for Congress

No. She invited someone who crossed state lines to abort her own child. Abortion is the highest sacrament of the Far-Left's toxic "religion." They don't view it as a necessary evil anymore...they view it as something to be proud of. Think of how sick and twisted that is. Leaders like Joe Biden and Debbie Wasserman Schultz think that women should be PROUD to murder their own children because they're too inconvenient. We need to restore basic decency and strong values to America , and it won't happen as long as Debbie Wasserman Schultz sits in office and pulls stunts like this. I lost to her last November by a whisker...but in my district, I outperformed Ron DeSantis and won the highest percentage of votes of any Republican ever (without ANY Establishment support.) With more resources, l WILL close the deal in 2024...but we 've got to start early and for that I need your immediate help. | | | | Thank you! Carla Spalding Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CARLA SPALDING FOR CONGRESS This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. name: Wes Moore
subject: Black History Month
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58649991/391781981/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ2NmViNC1hNmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggxRv9qFrDVUodFKwyiT14ILMSnKJh_ylNlHBmmD5o=&emci=effbecb5-b7a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=edd66eb4-a6ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
Friend, February is Black History Month, a time to celebrate our culture while honoring the stories and recognizing the struggle of Black Americans throughout history. As the first Black governor of Maryland, only the third Black governor elected in the United States, and currently the only Black governor in office, I stand on the shoulders of so many others whose hard work and sacrifices made this achievable. Last month, I was sworn-in just blocks away from the Annapolis docks, where so many enslaved people arrived in this country against their will. We stood in front of a capitol building built by their hands. It is a testament to the fact that progress is not inevitable, but possible. We have made uneven and unimaginable progress since then. It is a history created by generations of people whose own history was lost, stolen, or never recorded. And it is a shared history – our history – made by people who, over the last two centuries, regardless of their origin story to Maryland, fought to build a state, and a country, that works for everybody. I took the oath of office on Frederick Douglass’ Bible as well as my grandfather’s Bible. Douglass is one of the most famous Marylanders in history, who was born into slavery but escaped to freedom and dedicated his life to fighting for equality and justice for all as an abolitionist. As a lifelong student of Douglass, it was an incredible honor for me to lay my hand on his Bible, graciously loaned by the National Park Service. Our movement aims to carry on Douglass’ mission as we work to leave no one behind.
_The moment I first saw Frederick Douglass’ Bible, presented by the National Park Service._ I also had my grandfather’s Bible with me during the inauguration, held by my two children. My grandfather, Rev. James Thomas, was my hero. He was the first Black minister in the history of the Dutch Reformed Church, and taught me the importance of having faith, not fear. I am committed to leading with the same bold vision he had.
_Left: My grandfather and me. Right: Reading from my grandfather’s Bible._ An important lesson my grandfather also imparted on me was it’s not about being “the first” — that should be an afterthought. It’s about what you do with that opportunity, and the work you do in that position to lift up others. Another highlight from inauguration day was meeting several remarkable young men from the Baltimore Collegiate School for Boys. I told them to remember that there is never a room they don’t belong in. They are the future. Maryland is home to many legendary Black leaders, from Frederick Douglass to Thurgood Marshall to Harriet Tubman. While we look back and remember their sacrifices, we must also look forward and continue the work. It is on us to build the state they hoped for and our children deserve. And it is an honor to do this work alongside you. **[If you’d like to learn more and find ways to celebrate Black History in Maryland this month, check out these museums, events, and tours highlighted by the Maryland Office of Tourism here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58649996/391781985/844984631?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ2NmViNC1hNmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hggxRv9qFrDVUodFKwyiT14ILMSnKJh_ylNlHBmmD5o=&emci=effbecb5-b7a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=edd66eb4-a6ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)** Elevate, Wes

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tammy Baldwin’s seat is in danger, and the time to take the threat seriously is now.
body:
We could lose this one
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ee62e5e-7871-493d-af4d-9d33af09b14b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Tammy Baldwin's in danger._** Wisconsin, to quote an old slogan, "ain't what it used to be." Back in the days of Senators Russ Feingold and Herb Kohl it was a safe Democratic state. _Yet, as we painfully are aware from Ron Johnson eking out a 1% win in 2022, the long, despicable reign of Gov. Scott Walker and gerrymandering/election suppression locked in via a right-wing Supreme Court (something else we're hoping to change), Wisconsin's changed._ [**_When Democrats were warned that Sen. Russ Feingold’s seat was in danger, not enough of us took it seriously. We all know better now. Help keep the awesome, progressive Tammy Baldwin and our Senate majority, and join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf971afd-0ff5-4cc2-9bca-b49fca3cb71e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Rural voters have moved to the GOP en masse, and Wisconsin is now one of 3-4 key swing states.**_ **_With Senator Baldwin's courage to not become a Kyrsten Sinema, proudly leading on progressive issues, she's put her Senate seat in danger._** **_And, now, polling is showing she could lose, a death blow to our Senate majority, costing us one of the foremost progressive champions in the Senate:_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca0983ac-022c-4082-bc8f-891083671fdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cb841e7-04de-4881-93fb-9584f88a6932/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Now the rumors are that abhorrent two-term Gov. Walker may join the race. He has name recognition and a love that delivers seats to Republicans--The Koch Bros have always had him on their Valentine's Day list, a key cog in their machine. _** **_Democrats must be rewarded for courage, not punished. Or we can prepare to see many more Sinemas and many fewer Baldwins. And we'll suffer mightily for it. _** [**_So, for the awesome, progressive Tammy Baldwin and our Senate majority, can you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te31ff158-c49e-4575-b99a-948fe8a89bad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) THANK YOU!! Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T973f7769-b0be-4b16-9bd0-c99c508ce17b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tammybaldwin5-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91e48c3b-532d-4af7-8be5-a31206146fc9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=1f7ccf7f-3fde-4f63-9f62-3b9811715dd1&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=1f7ccf7f-3fde-4f63-9f62-3b9811715dd1&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: Do you know what month it is?
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7062%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=YpBZhSrUBYQYmwp%2bC6VqMA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06779%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=phgv2xsarCrOtMvPjMrFCw&sysid=1)

Friend,

It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.

It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did:

_“You're going to relegate my history to a month?**Black history is American history.** ”_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today_ -- I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06770%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eJ1IQWuPvYzVA008HXwiFw&sysid=1)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06771%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CkHPEseNoo%2fpP9co3TWJhA&sysid=1)

Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06772%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H3mcgVqdWWBDdHLUj2WbVQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06773%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=88tTpGDiKp0DtfqS1Txheg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06774%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zSs9eGJlcSY3X6B0rmvl9Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZoLB89Ir5TOza2doOGf20A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06786%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XD1uwGghOpj%2b1zxwmPwKvA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06787%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kk2BBFyq9%2fdSL%2fqM9z4CHA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06788%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rc%2bDIhLmquYDHEoubivzVw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06789%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mpMeZ%2fMwais1OLsJKgz5BQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06780%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=geg7DGdq5HCwBt2ahtEbKg&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better. It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did: “You're going to relegate my history to a month?Black history is American history. ” My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today -- I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens
subject: Do you know what month it is?
body:
It’s Black History Month. . .
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0tc46ejb97s4l1r0q2mefliea4i2mrl003esk78_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg6ao70shh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zse95coffr4bjv98b1c8og3soe79c5c0s53ssoi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg6ao70shh2bs)

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1qliacn0r4ni063dun5tvujg0n4cbltusotirfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg6ao70shh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Who can you trust?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)
|
[**Survey: Do you trust Democrats to tell the truth -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)
Peter,

President Biden's speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright _bizarre_.

I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington.

They believe Biden's open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership.

Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden's speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China.

Really? Does he define "standing up to China" as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month?

If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don't, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive, and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it.

What you won't hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like:

* letting biological boys compete against girls in sports
* believing men can get pregnant
* open borders, and
* sending free money to able-bodied people who don't work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us

They're hiding their real agenda, but I'm glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it.

**[What I'm very curious to know, and why I'm emailing you today, is to find out whether you trust the government. More pointedly, do you trust Democrats to be truthful with you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)**

[**Let us know if you trust Democrats
to tell the truth -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)
I'm worried that we could be losing support for our movement. My team tells me that folks aren't opening our emails as often as they once did or even engaging with the content we send. I implore you to remain involved. **[Please let us know you've read this email by confirming your survey response here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)**

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62317803:Jn-hNiGNk:m:1:3331421248:2F4023C26AB98A2E43BCD752162EE1BF:r)

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zep69o9htvd7bc0k2g74ptmrfmhevi68kkdpsfk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjuomvevm4urv2hquk6tbnsunf87l06bikahfat8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhviofud40g7si0e01tk3kso6n9dc0u3hk56ir98_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4nnpdroik84ng9oov86mhcqsnbatlrach3p3gfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlc4aldqglu27ttsc5isqs4e6f4oh8gao4jon9lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdf0ukpu22jgnvskbtpv1uii0aojuk73eqd0ag8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1q99efjdqrpm9645lqkodhob4j7ao0skevvhum8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrmt19j44hjq11iknkr6d10hs180nji3i0hqb7bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z004f0qpudnan26nnhe6046q613gb4mmkj7l3ls0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhqia3dn0g7rtlf2fsu9l6icf0le2eplkglme6to_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrln2n120vlg11v9ugvl6nb501vl488catk9mr0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbet06eod0mcc1vrdpkmi9o1278jvfrnql35e218_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg61pr3c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi3l90l4u2p1tt40it731d50ni753jd9jc4nhf40_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg69oj5cdh2bs)

---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3uogek7ub5susv19t0l0dd5rtmnq9iv85ck19eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpg69oj5cdh2bs "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?")**

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let’s set the record straight. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1651%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kDRJvcODO9SWakqE5NdozA&sysid=1)

| |
---
| | | Let’s set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump’s supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people’s House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659858%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k2UWh%2fbOBG64nMahcXqj%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| | [PROMISES KEPT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659859%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hs9Oq7ejIUoqbOLvlirDBg&sysid=1)
---
| | [STAND WITH US](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659850%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uc2lyJf%2bSV5ewkcLbGGYQA&sysid=1)
---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659851%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GtsUJ8mt5YzigYqVgV7eig&sysid=1 "Can I ask that you chip in
$1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark
money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH US](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659850%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uc2lyJf%2bSV5ewkcLbGGYQA&sysid=1)
---

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing. Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power. We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed. "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?" | | Thank you, Speaker Kevin McCarthy | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: E. Sanderson
subject: In case you missed it…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
we can’t take what’s happening in North Carolina lightly.
|
---

Did you see All On The Line’s message from last week? This is a critical moment for our fair maps movement, team and I hope you’re ready to step up.
We know there will be redraws happening across the country, and with all our progress in our fight against gerrymandering, this act of political favoritism must be checked.
**[Sign our petition if you condemn this action and believe the courts should remain independent and protect the rights of voters as the state constitution requires.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58667048/391843182/-1983457736?refcode=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&source=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2OWVjOTUwLWNhYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtffc_ZVAD2fOVQL5y5AyBLKIrHkOHOZ21_rmNiWwM=&emci=cae4a1df-87a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b69ec950-caab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**
A.G. Holder made the agenda of the extremist conservative legislators who are bringing the case clear. They are okay with getting fewer votes as long as they hold onto their power.
Team -- _**That is a huge red flag.**_
**[Will you add your name to our petition if you support protecting the rights of voters as the state constitution requires?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58667049/391843183/-1983457736?refcode=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&source=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2OWVjOTUwLWNhYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtffc_ZVAD2fOVQL5y5AyBLKIrHkOHOZ21_rmNiWwM=&emci=cae4a1df-87a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b69ec950-caab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**
Thank you for your support,
Emuni Sanderson
Mobilization Strategist

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Breaking News via [AOTL]
Date: Mon, Feb 6, 2023
Subject: The North Carolina Supreme Court is taking action... and it isn’t good.
> Team -- North Carolina Supreme Court decisions in _Harper v. Hall_ in 2022 were monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard.
>
> But last week, newly sworn-in justices on North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views by agreeing to reconsider the _Harper v. Hall_ ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map.
> [**‘’This is not a function of legal principle -- it is an indication of political opportunism.’’**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58667050/391843184/2105777232?refcode=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&source=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2OWVjOTUwLWNhYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtffc_ZVAD2fOVQL5y5AyBLKIrHkOHOZ21_rmNiWwM=)
> **\-- A.G. Eric Holder**
> | [**HELP US ADVOCATE FOR FAIR MAPS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58667051/391843185/2105777232?refcode=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&source=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2OWVjOTUwLWNhYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtffc_ZVAD2fOVQL5y5AyBLKIrHkOHOZ21_rmNiWwM=)
> ---
> Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), has been in North Carolina fighting gerrymandered maps for the past five years. And amidst this attempt to politicize the state’s judicial branch, the NRF remains steadfast in its support of the plaintiffs in _Harper v. Hall_ , who are standing tall against gerrymandering.
> _**So, what’s changed?**_
>
> [**Let’s be clear. Nothing in state law has changed.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58667052/391843186/2105777232?refcode=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&source=20230211_AOTL_F_NCForward_RedLitexSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2OWVjOTUwLWNhYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jCtffc_ZVAD2fOVQL5y5AyBLKIrHkOHOZ21_rmNiWwM=) But Republican legislative leadership filed their petition to **_undermine the state’s system of checks and balances_** , under their belief that new justices on the state supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation.
> We can’t stress enough that the fair maps movement is about putting people over politics. And we won’t stand for lawmakers continuing to damage our democratic infrastructure that safeguards people’s rights.
> We need your help. clean_body: we can’t take what’s happening in North Carolina lightly. | Did you see All On The Line’s message from last week? This is a critical moment for our fair maps movement, team and I hope you’re ready to step up. We know there will be redraws happening across the country, and with all our progress in our fight against gerrymandering, this act of political favoritism must be checked. A.G. Holder made the agenda of the extremist conservative legislators who are bringing the case clear. They are okay with getting fewer votes as long as they hold onto their power. Team -- That is a huge red flag. Thank you for your support, Emuni Sanderson Mobilization Strategist \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Breaking News via [AOTL] Date: Mon, Feb 6, 2023 Subject: The North Carolina Supreme Court is taking action... and it isn’t good. Team -- North Carolina Supreme Court decisions in Harper v. Hall in 2022 were monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard. But last week, newly sworn-in justices on North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views by agreeing to reconsider the Harper v. Hall ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map. = \-- A.G. Eric Holder | = --- Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), has been in North Carolina fighting gerrymandered maps for the past five years. And amidst this attempt to politicize the state’s judicial branch, the NRF remains steadfast in its support of the plaintiffs in Harper v. Hall , who are standing tall against gerrymandering. So, what’s changed? = But Republican legislative leadership filed their petition to undermine the state’s system of checks and balances , under their belief that new justices on the state supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation. We can’t stress enough that the fair maps movement is about putting people over politics. And we won’t stand for lawmakers continuing to damage our democratic infrastructure that safeguards people’s rights. We need your help. All On The Line is committed to advocating for fair maps in North Carolina and across the county. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: --- = | = = | = = | = Your donation helps All On The Line’s work to stop these anti-democratic threats pushed by extremist lawmakers for political opportunity. \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:

Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.

| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zajqtmr12j1pmtiu9fm96a8faoroid970ufn2bo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpi64pj0c1h2bs)
---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…

body:
Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.

| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

body:
I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE beha

| |

| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu9jvgaf2vi8pftrcakhqqqbnc8dhbtdqb5cg488_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpi6cp74s1h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf2o4e31j18caeujkhk3tpolr8fn6m66sbssm7m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpi6cp74s1h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1564c4r1qvcf3q819hg32pe1ebc4ei60502cn18_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpi6cp74s1h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

clean_body: It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate Friend, It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. name: Dan Kildee
subject: Delivering vs. Posturing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Team,

There’s a real difference between the new House Republican majority and the recently-elected Michigan State Legislature now under the leadership of Democrats.

Unfortunately, the new Congress is off to a slow start. After an almost week-long delay to elect Kevin McCarthy the Speaker of the House, the new Republican majority has only passed a few partisan messaging bills that have no chance of becoming law.

This is in stark contrast to the Democratic-led Michigan State Legislature. Working with Governor Whitmer, our state legislators have gotten to work, introducing bills focused on kitchen table economic issues like:

→ Largest tax cut in decades for Michiganders
→ Restoring Michigan’s prevailing wage
→ Increasing the Working Families Tax Credit
→ Delivering inflation relief checks
→ Repealing retirement tax; and
→ Getting rid of the so-called “Right to Work” law hurting workers

**In the last election, Michiganders voted for pragmatic, thoughtful leaders who are focused on the real issues facing families.** My constituents are sick and tired of political infighting and partisan bickering that does nothing to improve their lives.

**[Click here to add your name if you stand with Michigan Democrats and our agenda for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58652923/391792263/-1778517771?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230213_PT_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_michigandems&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhkMjRlMS1hYWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQu4uHevAQnzOGgJGqY_ej3UHfI5KdfU6Vj7oMhz2c4=&emci=2aec9198-62a9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=808d24e1-aaab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**

I am committed to working with anyone, including Republicans, Independents, and Democrats, if it means delivering results and doing what’s right by Michigan.

Thanks,

Dan

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See What We Did?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You spoke and we listened. **This Radical, Globalist, left-wing agenda on full display in St Paul is going to fundamentally change the direction of our state.** Democrats have already passed the most extreme abortion bill in the nation, allowing babies at 7 lbs and 39 weeks old to be murdered in the womb. And the Radicals at the Capitol also just passed a bill that will increase your energy costs, while making our energy system less reliable with a government mandate to be 80% off of fossil fuels in Minnesota in just 7 years; 100% off them by 2040! Meanwhile, there's a bill moving through the MN House that would make Minnesota a Sanctuary State for "Gender Affirming" surgeries - or what we know them as - abusive, child genital mutilation surgeries. We covered this on today's show: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfKASHwnIic4yRIHUiEbNVfezHbX2FeFF3AXpJfUjL4hGVD6wb2kuwnNmOfRmxCZxjWjifpMuCppkbmNw4i4i_qlNdEz5rtYTgnx9nz_jyXmRPxxq2iShyTH4UoTxUAfvNQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=2) It gets worse... **The Radicals are also moving these items through the legislature at record speed:**
* **Gun Control**
* **Tax Increases**
* **License Tab Increases**
* **Drivers Licenses for Illegals**
* **Dismantling Voting Security Protections**

The global, leftist agenda is a serious threat to us all. And now the frontlines of the implementation of that agenda is right here in Minnesota. I've heard other groups say "well, elections have consequences" then do NOTHING about it. Well I'm not fine with that. And neither are you.
## I've heard you loud and clear that YOU WANT ACTION.
Our name is Action 4 Liberty for a reason. When politicians vote against our liberties, we create political pain. Which is exactly what we are going to do. Because WE CANNOT LET the Radical Democrats kill our state without a fight. So I just authorized a MASSIVE field operation program which launched today in St Cloud and will likely span from the Iron Range to the North Dakota border down to Mankato. We're going to make things very painful for vulnerable Democrat legislators who are voting for this Globalist, Liberal agenda. We have a door knocking team on the ground right now in St Cloud letting Sen Aric Putnam and Rep Dan Wolgamott's voters know how they are voting for an EXTREME agenda. **Our field team took this stack of lit off my desk this morning and headed up north to get it on doors.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=3) This is just the start. But I can't do it alone. Only with YOUR help can these operations be deployed. **In 2021, your contributions allowed us to:** **> >> Knocked on 40,000 doors** **> >> Made 55,000 targeted phone calls** **> >> Run digital ads with over a million impressions** All this culminated with ENDING WALZ' TYRANICAL EMERGENCY POWERS. Every day, as the battles get more intense, we want to be at the doors of independent voters in these battleground districts, educating them on how their Democrat is about to vote on more radical bills. Politicians care about one thing: getting re-elected. So the place to hit them where it hurts is by uncovering their radical agenda to their voters. But field operations cost A LOT of money. And they will tie up my staff full time. Which is something we are ready to do if you have our back. I desperately need to start hiring more field operatives IMMEDIATELY and get them into this battle. We have a top notch recruitment pipeline of young liberty professionals - all we need are the resources to get this going. **Please help me with a donation right now to help us grow this operation exponentially!!!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=4 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=4)
---
Listen, these pressure campaigns work!
In 2021, we picked 7 vulnerable Democrat targets so we could get a vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers.
* **3 of the 7 targets QUIT and didn't run for re-election in 2022.**
* **Another 2 of the targets (Reps Sandstede and Ecklund) got beat in the election.**
* **And the remaining two vulnerable Democrats are voting with Republicans against some of this Radical agenda already this year. They are TERRIFIED of what's to come if they get on board.**

This PRESSURE works! It's the only way to win this fight.
Which is why we are wasting no time. One of my field operatives, MAGA Jesse, just sent me these pictures from the lit drop in St Cloud.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=5)
There are another three vulnerable Democrat Senators on our target list and six more Democrat Representatives.
It's vitally important that we reach their voters at the doors and let them know about this Radical Liberal agenda in St Paul.
Peter, can you help me build up these operations and put more doorknockers in these targeted districts?
We don't have much time. The Democrats are moving these radical bills at lightening speed. We MUST STOP THEM!
[**Please donate $25, $50, $100 or even $200. Or if you want to make a MASSIVE IMPACT, sponsor a door knocker for a week at $1,250 (fuel, lodging and pay).**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=6)
And just like in 2021 when we forced the Democrat controlled House to End Walz Emergency Powers, we can fight back to stop their onslaught.
Thank you in advance!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States

Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_we_re_doing4&n=10), software for leaders.

When politicians vote against our liberties, we create political pain. Which is exactly what we are going to do. Because WE CANNOT LET the Radical Democrats kill our state without a fight. So I just authorized a MASSIVE field operation program which launched today in St Cloud and will likely span from the Iron Range to the North Dakota border down to Mankato. We're going to make things very painful for vulnerable Democrat legislators who are voting for this Globalist, Liberal agenda. We have a door knocking team on the ground right now in St Cloud letting Sen Aric Putnam and Rep Dan Wolgamott's voters know how they are voting for an EXTREME agenda. Our field team took this stack of lit off my desk this morning and headed up north to get it on doors. This is just the start. But I can't do it alone. Only with YOUR help can these operations be deployed. In 2021, your contributions allowed us to: > >> Knocked on 40,000 doors > >> Made 55,000 targeted phone calls > >> Run digital ads with over a million impressions All this culminated with ENDING WALZ' TYRANICAL EMERGENCY POWERS. Every day, as the battles get more intense, we want to be at the doors of independent voters in these battleground districts, educating them on how their Democrat is about to vote on more radical bills. Politicians care about one thing: getting re-elected. So the place to hit them where it hurts is by uncovering their radical agenda to their voters. But field operations cost A LOT of money. And they will tie up my staff full time. Which is something we are ready to do if you have our back. I desperately need to start hiring more field operatives IMMEDIATELY and get them into this battle. We have a top notch recruitment pipeline of young liberty professionals - all we need are the resources to get this going. Please help me with a donation right now to help us grow this operation exponentially!!! | "Donate" Listen, these pressure campaigns work! In 2021, we picked 7 vulnerable Democrat targets so we could get a vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers. 3 of the 7 targets QUIT and didn't run for re-election in 2022. Another 2 of the targets (Reps Sandstede and Ecklund) got beat in the election. And the remaining two vulnerable Democrats are voting with Republicans against some of this Radical agenda already this year. They are TERRIFIED of what's to come if they get on board. This PRESSURE works! It's the only way to win this fight. Which is why we are wasting no time. One of my field operatives, MAGA Jesse, just sent me these pictures from the lit drop in St Cloud. There are another three vulnerable Democrat Senators on our target list and six more Democrat Representatives. It's vitally important that we reach their voters at the doors and let them know about this Radical Liberal agenda in St Paul. Peter, can you help me build up these operations and put more doorknockers in these targeted districts? We don't have much time. The Democrats are moving these radical bills at lightening speed. We MUST STOP THEM! And just like in 2021 when we forced the Democrat controlled House to End Walz Emergency Powers, we can fight back to stop their onslaught. Thank you in advance! In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States

Peter, here’s what you need to know about me:

I’m the proud son of a social worker and a substance abuse counselor and a product of New York City’s public schools.

I grew up in a working-class family. It wasn’t always easy, but my parents believed in America’s promise, worked hard and taught me to pursue my dreams.

House Democrats stand united against extreme MAGA Republicans, put People Over Politics and protect our democracy as we continue delivering for the American people.

Our work to take back the House starts now – but I can’t do it without you by my side.
[_**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join 10,000 supporters and sign your name, lend me your support and help me prove we have what it takes to retake the House and get things done For The People. Can I count on your signature? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58674610/391854486/-1547010893?source=20230213_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2QyZjVjYS1kNGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2AyvhEjK1ZLPliE5pcyLJsDZTd-DvVJ-336ORRQHfM=&emci=68f09aba-caab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f7d2f5ca-d4ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)
Peter, I’ll be blunt: winning back the House is going to take everything we’ve got.

The good news is: we’re only FIVE seats away from putting the House back in Democratic hands.

Your support will help me build the grassroots foundation we need to reclaim the House and get to work on the issues facing everyday people.

I’ll have your back every single day as Leader. But right now, I need you to have mine with your personal support.
[_**I can’t overstate how much it would mean to me at this critical moment. Will you sign your name and help me reach 10,000 supporters before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58674611/391854488/-1547010893?source=20230213_em_pet_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2QyZjVjYS1kNGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2AyvhEjK1ZLPliE5pcyLJsDZTd-DvVJ-336ORRQHfM=&emci=68f09aba-caab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f7d2f5ca-d4ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)

Hakeem

subject: a real killer for a campaign like ours

body:
Here is the direct and honest truth:
#

Peter -
Here is the direct and honest truth:
For a campaign like ours, funded primarily by small-dollar donations, we can’t afford stretches of weeks where fundraising slows down by too much.
When that happens, it can be a real killer for a campaign like ours.
We don’t have the collection of hedge fund managers and drug company executives who will drop a stack of $6,600 checks off at a fundraiser.
So we have to keep things moving knowing that people can’t give to every email they receive, but they can give to some of them over the course of the campaign.
We hope you’ll choose to give today.
We hope you’ll choose to give because we’re in one of those slow stretches right now.
We hope you’ll choose to give because we’ve set a 3-day fundraising drive to close the gap on our fundraising goals.
So please. Make today be the day you give to elect Ruben:
[**Please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate. body:
Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.

| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: I'm right where I need to be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress](https://links
body:
| | | When people think of Congress, they generally think of debate and votes on the House floor. While that is very important, there is another essential component of Congress, which is _**the committee process**_. Through the work of committees, Congress is able to hold the administration accountable, discuss issues, find solutions, and develop bills through the hearings process. Republicans have been clear in our commitment to a transparent, more accountable government, which means passing legislation the right way – through the committee process.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=06aafb97a85a479ea06fd963fefc94de&_e=ojQ6BpPziKqpZdtNPrJymf5nF1T4TXT53Ie157Shpnc4a3OFeCr2Ol46Qs8RYgpxN3uwB1fOnyAkMODc_ldrQsVRp98Hfuo09Vc37Z_H4UgrLq4Fm9xm9it-_u87Cozml2YdiKoon7S9L2yH3Ct3VMEJ0P9IyGXQxQTCNjESV1Mhp0uhcDvprCxVoi6kae2YNkrQQ6_4OWC3Ro4VPpKxLQ%3D%3D)
---
I am very excited about the committee assignments I have earned. On the _**Agriculture Committee**_ , I will help craft a strong, five-year Farm Bill reauthorization. I have been selected as the Chairman of the _**Nutrition, Foreign Agriculture,**_ and _**Horticulture Subcommittee. **_ I will also serve on the **_General Farm Commodities, Risk Management,_** and** _Credit_** Subcommittees of the Agriculture Committee. As one of the few active farmers in Congress, I am committed to making sure Minnesota has a strong voice on the Agriculture Committee during the Farm Bill process.
---
I always say food security is national security, so my second committee ties in perfectly, that is the _**House Armed Services Committee.**_ This important committee oversees our national defense and military forces. I am also proud to be serving on the _**Readiness Subcommittee**_ and the _**Military Personnel Subcommittee**_. Recent provocations by China have clearly demonstrated that we must never let our guard down. I understand that serving on this committee is a major responsibility and I am honored to work for you there. I am ready to really get to work on these committees and am grateful to serve as your voice in Congress.
---
Thank you, **Brad Finstad**
---
