clean_body: | | | When people think of Congress, they generally think of debate and votes on the House floor. While that is very important, there is another essential component of Congress, which is the committee process. Through the work of committees, Congress is able to hold the administration accountable, discuss issues, find solutions, and develop bills through the hearings process. Republicans have been clear in our commitment to a transparent, more accountable government, which means passing legislation the right way – through the committee process. I am very excited about the committee assignments I have earned. On the Agriculture Committee , I will help craft a strong, five-year Farm Bill reauthorization. I have been selected as the Chairman of the Nutrition, Foreign Agriculture, and Horticulture Subcommittee. I will also serve on the General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit Subcommittees of the Agriculture Committee. As one of the few active farmers in Congress, I am committed to making sure Minnesota has a strong voice on the Agriculture Committee during the Farm Bill process. I always say food security is national security, so my second committee ties in perfectly, that is the House Armed Services Committee. This important committee oversees our national defense and military forces. I am also proud to be serving on the Readiness Subcommittee and the Military Personnel Subcommittee. Recent provocations by China have clearly demonstrated that we must never let our guard down. I understand that serving on this committee is a major responsibility and I am honored to work for you there. I am ready to really get to work on these committees and am grateful to serve as your voice in Congress. Thank you, Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Wisconsin used to be a swing state, but in eight days it could go full red for a long time, if these Supreme Court candidates don’t win the primary for the open seat on the State Supreme Court. This could affect abortion rights across the country, and possibly how the state’s electoral votes count in the 2024 presidential race. A lot is hanging on this Feb. 21st primary.
body:

| | | | | Peter, **_In eight days Wisconsin could become a red state for the foreseeable future._ **_On February 21st, there's a first round of elections for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat_ _\--a top two primary_ _._ [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taab2604e-2002-49b6-87d9-fa6e8ecda647/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From our friends at Pod Save America:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81f21e77-2762-4290-8fdb-02447c87d9bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To recap from a previous email we sent: **_With a right winger leaving Wisconsin's Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat. There'__s an open primary Feb. 21st __with two Democrats and two Republicans_ _. If Dems run first and second, we guarantee a win in April's general election. At the very least, we must stop both Republicans from winning the 21st, shutting us out of the general election._** _Meanwhile, The Wisconsin Democratic Party just shared:_ We just got word MAGA Republican-aligned candidate Jennifer Dorow just placed a $60,000 ad buy.

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Adam Schiff
subject: Because of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| My service as an impeachment manager against Donald Trump. My oversight of the January 6th attack and the hearings we held. My work leading the House Intelligence Committee.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1744%2E5257348%2EEkyFrK)
Derek, I am able to do this because of you.
My service as an impeachment manager against Donald Trump. My oversight of the January 6th attack and the hearings we held. My work leading the House Intelligence Committee. And let’s face it — the many, _many_ interviews I do on TV speaking truth to power about Republicans’ wrongdoings. And holding them accountable every day.
**None of that would be possible without you.**
Because you chip in when you can. Because you care. Because you read the many, _many_ messages like this one. **Because I can count on you.**
Derek, here’s the truth. A lot of my colleagues are busy dialing their big-money donors to keep their campaigns afloat (that’s the unfortunate thing about running for office).
But because of you, I can spend my time focusing on my job — reading briefings, attending committee hearings, meeting with constituents, and yes, communicating directly with the people on TV and social media.
**Because I can count on this team, I can focus on protecting our democracy and taking that message directly to the American people.**
**[I’m hoping that I can count on you now that I’m running for the United States Senate. Because of you, I know we can win this race. Can you chip in $3 today so I can focus on the work ahead?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=feb2023_abs_em.nEPr_T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20230213_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1744%2E5257348%2EEkyFrK)**

I’m incredibly grateful, Derek.

Adam

subject: It's time for Mike Pence to tell the truth -- the whole truth -- and help put Trump in jail where he belongs.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Mike Pence: "Stop Protecting Trump! Help Put Him in Jail!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a8ea1da-66ca-4f53-9a72-0c8bf606f0e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7490b1e0-ab8f-43e4-8f93-809cc43b9b61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Mike Pence has been subpoenaed by the special counsel investigating the Capitol attack, and he will have his chance to tell the story of what happened that day -- including Trump's role. **And he should tell the truth -- the whole truth -- and help put Trump in jail where he belongs.** Thus far, while Pence has been mildly critical of Trump on occasion, he has avoided saying things which might incriminate him, and has instead been irritatingly vague, or hidden behind false claims of executive privilege. **Trump incited a mob to go kill Pence. Pence and his family barely escaped with their lives. It's time for Pence to man up, and tell the full story.** [**Tell Mike Pence: "Stop protecting Trump! Put him in jail where he belongs!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T884d744e-881f-43f3-aaa1-e3c654ccd99b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Mike Pence has been subpoenaed by the special counsel investigating the Capitol attack, and he will have his chance to tell the story of what happened that day -- including Trump's role. And he should tell the truth -- the whole truth -- and help put Trump in jail where he belongs. Thus far, while Pence has been mildly critical of Trump on occasion, he has avoided saying things which might incriminate him, and has instead been irritatingly vague, or hidden behind false claims of executive privilege. Trump incited a mob to go kill Pence. Pence and his family barely escaped with their lives. It's time for Pence to man up, and tell the full story. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - you are getting this because you have supported Democratic actions and candidates in the past. But if you would rather not get these any more, just click on the "unsubscribe" link below) | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Urgent Action Needed: Join the Fight to Keep AZ-4 Blue and Stop MAGA Kelly Cooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58657671/391810394/-2123754196?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.13_b1_gs_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMwMzRmYjItYjJhYi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vdw6sCC-LxyobZchgEDGWcN2YHGi-rEQy0R6Ess4ay4=) Friends – **we can’t let our foot off the gas.**

We are still in the midst of a crucial fight for the soul of Arizona and the future of our country. We were successful last November, but we can’t take anything for granted. MAGA Republicans are already mobilizing to flip Arizona red in the next election, so it’s essential that we come together now to protect the progress we’ve made and keep our state moving forward.

As you know, my focus has always been on improving the lives of Arizonans. I fly home every weekend to work in my district and I’ve worked across the aisle to be a tireless advocate for Arizona. However, our progress is now at risk:

**MAGA Kelly Cooper – who came close to beating me last year – has already announced he’s going to run against me again. His extreme views are immediately disqualifying for Arizona voters and would push a dangerous MAGA agenda in D.C.**

That is why I need your help now more than ever: I am setting a goal to raise $5,000 before our crucial mid-month deadline on February 15th. Hitting this goal is essential to power our grassroots campaign, stop Kelly Cooper and the MAGA Republicans, and keep this seat blue.

[**I am asking you to stand with me and make a contribution of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford, to help us build a strong campaign and ensure we have the resources we need to win in November. clean_body: = Friends – we can’t let our foot off the gas. We are still in the midst of a crucial fight for the soul of Arizona and the future of our country. We were successful last November, but we can’t take anything for granted. MAGA Republicans are already mobilizing to flip Arizona red in the next election, so it’s essential that we come together now to protect the progress we’ve made and keep our state moving forward. As you know, my focus has always been on improving the lives of Arizonans. I fly home every weekend to work in my district and I’ve worked across the aisle to be a tireless advocate for Arizona. However, our progress is now at risk: MAGA Kelly Cooper – who came close to beating me last year – has already announced he’s going to run against me again. His extreme views are immediately disqualifying for Arizona voters and would push a dangerous MAGA agenda in D.C. That is why I need your help now more than ever: I am setting a goal to raise $5,000 before our crucial mid-month deadline on February 15th. Hitting this goal is essential to power our grassroots campaign, stop Kelly Cooper and the MAGA Republicans, and keep this seat blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Together, we can protect the progress we’ve made, fight for our values, and keep Arizona moving forward. name: Jena Griswold
subject: Secretary Griswold Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
In January, I was officially sworn in to my second term as Colorado Secretary of State. It is an honor serving Colorado for another four years, and I am proud to have such strong support from Coloradans!

People like me usually don’t serve in statewide office. As a child, my family relied on food stamps from time to time, and I grew up in rural Colorado in a cabin with an outhouse out back. As Secretary of State, I work to ensure that Coloradans who grew up like me have equal access to Colorado’s elections.
To thank Coloradans for their support and celebrate our historic win, we held inaugural events in Denver, Boulder, Montrose, Grand Junction, Durango, Pueblo, Colorado Springs, Fort Collins, and the Vail Valley.
Last year, I helped lead the national fight against election deniers and helped defeat election denier candidates for secretary of state in battleground states, including Michigan, Nevada, Arizona, New Mexico, and Minnesota. Thankfully, American voters chose democracy in the midterms, but as a nation, we are not yet out of the woods. Extremism and election denialism are still threatening our fundamental freedoms. I am proud to announce that I was re-elected to serve as Chair of the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, where I will continue to protect our democracy and fundamental freedoms alongside pro-democracy Secretaries of State.
There’s so much more to accomplish during this next term. Colorado’s elections are the gold standard, and my office will keep working to protect our elections. We’ll also help small businesses and fight for hard-working Coloradans.
Follow me on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram to stay up-to-date on my work.
Thank you for your support.
Best,
Jena Griswold
Colorado Secretary of State
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

body:
It used to be that most people thought “Veteran” was synonymous with “conservative.”
#
Here’s what they say about service:
“We have a woke military that can’t fight or win”
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230213-1-15&t=1&akid=7350%2E3013755%2EmaM4Yb)
“I know a lot of young people don't want to have anything to do with that. **It's like throwing your life away”**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230213-1-15&t=2&akid=7350%2E3013755%2EmaM4Yb)
“We’ve got a military that is more interested in pronouns than winning wars”
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230213-1-15&t=3&akid=7350%2E3013755%2EmaM4Yb)
**No one — absolutely no one — will fight harder to hold Donald Trump and the Republican Party accountable for their disdain for Veterans and Military families.**
It used to be that most people thought “Veteran” was synonymous with “conservative.”
Not anymore.
Because of the work we’ve done, we’re flipping that narrative on its head, we’re turning out Veterans and Military families for Democrats, and we’re elevating the voices of Veterans in some of the most powerful ads.
But we cannot do it alone. So please:
[**Can we count on you to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to help VoteVets fight back against Republicans who attack service while cloaking themselves in the flag and pretending to be patriots?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230213-1-15&t=4&akid=7350%2E3013755%2EmaM4Yb)

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: The first month of the new Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
100 town halls held, 16 bills signed into law, and counting! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58659420/391817441/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ5OWE3My1iN2FiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rfjgu0aLOQ3HzOEn6DK3JZ6ThQqcsNzFteckkHxS-Lw=&emci=fc1297f6-9fa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9b499a73-b7ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

We're over one month into the 118th United States Congress, and I bet most of the headlines you've seen have been about chaos under Kevin McCarthy's leadership – from the multi-ballot election for Speaker of the House to dangerous bills introduced by MAGA extremists.

While we may be in for a challenging term in the House, I've been laser-focused on getting results for the people of Washington's 8th District – and I wanted to give you a few updates from the start of my third term.

**I was elected Vice Ranking Member of the Energy and Commerce Committee!** I was honored to be elected by my colleagues to serve in a leadership position on this powerful committee. I'm ready to work on legislation to lower prescription drug costs, move towards a carbon neutral future, and hold corporations accountable for price gouging.

**My 16th bill was signed into law.** The bipartisan National Forest Remediation & Restoration Act will fund the restoration of damaged public lands.

**We hit a milestone: my 100th town hall.** I ran for Congress on the promise to fight for and listen to the people of Washington's 8th District, and that's exactly what I'm continuing to do.

No matter which party holds the majority, I'll keep fighting for the people of WA-08 – but I can't do it without your support, Peter.

**[Will you chip in before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help ensure my team and I have the resources to protect this seat and keep fighting for the people of Washington State – and across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58659421/391817444/1225393486?refcode=em23_230213_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230213_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ5OWE3My1iN2FiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rfjgu0aLOQ3HzOEn6DK3JZ6ThQqcsNzFteckkHxS-Lw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58659422/391817445/1225393486?refcode=em23_230213_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230213_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ5OWE3My1iN2FiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rfjgu0aLOQ3HzOEn6DK3JZ6ThQqcsNzFteckkHxS-Lw=)

clean_body: 100 town halls held, 16 bills signed into law, and counting! Peter, We're over one month into the 118th United States Congress, and I bet most of the headlines you've seen have been about chaos under Kevin McCarthy's leadership – from the multi-ballot election for Speaker of the House to dangerous bills introduced by MAGA extremists. While we may be in for a challenging term in the House, I've been laser-focused on getting results for the people of Washington's 8th District – and I wanted to give you a few updates from the start of my third term. I was elected Vice Ranking Member of the Energy and Commerce Committee! I was honored to be elected by my colleagues to serve in a leadership position on this powerful committee. I'm ready to work on legislation to lower prescription drug costs, move towards a carbon neutral future, and hold corporations accountable for price gouging. My 16th bill was signed into law. The bipartisan National Forest Remediation & Restoration Act will fund the restoration of damaged public lands. We hit a milestone: my 100th town hall. I ran for Congress on the promise to fight for and listen to the people of Washington's 8th District, and that's exactly what I'm continuing to do. No matter which party holds the majority, I'll keep fighting for the people of WA-08 – but I can't do it without your support, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. # Chairman Ager's Statement Following the Passing of the Hon. Gary Hopper
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
February 13, 2023
---
| CONTACT:
Chris Ager
(603) 318-4437
---
| | Concord, NH - The New Hampshire Republican Party is deeply saddened by the passing of long-time State Representative Gary Hopper of Weare. Chairman Chris Ager issued the following statement: "Rep. Hopper was a dedicated public servant, having served in the New Hampshire House of Representatives from 2000 to 2004 and 2008 to 2022. During his time in office, Rep. Hopper worked tirelessly to improve the lives of his constituents and his state. His commitment to public service and dedication to his community was unwavering and will be dearly missed. On behalf of the State Party, I offer my deepest condolences to Rep. Hopper’s family and friends. His loss will be felt deeply throughout the State."###

name: American Liberty Fund
subject: Pfizer and Project Veritas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7686%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=L5SCYcJRzzktLsNMw3lBNQ&sysid=1)
My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government. | | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78842%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=67LekjOR0Fix1GSMviSeJg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78843%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0MAReAIa5X%2bCImKRACEqZw&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

I’m sure by now you’ve seen James O’Keefe’s investigation that exposed Pfizer for working to create a deadlier variant of COVID19.

Within weeks of James releasing that report, his organization, Project Veritas, is in disarray and James’ board of directors has placed him on paid leave.

**It’s no coincidence that this occurred right after they exposed one of the largest industries in the world. These people will CRUSH anyone who stands in their way.**

[**I’m asking for your help to expose Pfizer’s power in politics by funding a series of ads that . . . . TELLS . . . . THE . . .TRUTH.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78844%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TSOzIo3%2bYaKUvJj8CRLiUg&sysid=1)

[**Please donate today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78955%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WARy7X%2brgCZvZsRque9s8g&sysid=1)

I take this very personally. James is a friend and I’m one of the first executive directors of Project Veritas, helping James get the organization off the ground and thriving for seven years.

As a Marine Corps veteran, our motto “Semper Fidelis” - “Always Faithful” will always ring true in my heart when applied to the Corps, my family and my friends.

In politics, there is an infinitesimally small group of men and women who are true believers that fight for Liberty. We’re not in it for the money, fame, power, etc. Most of us try and stay under the radar so we can support each other without the distractions of the media or attacks by the Left (they always still come every once in a while).

**We are a small group, and we are family - and always faithful to each other. **

Mess with one of us, **and you mess with all of us.**

Now, my SuperPAC, American Liberty Fund, is jumping into this fight with everything we have.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic, Pfizer dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

From town mayors to U.S. Senators, checks were cut from Pfizer to buy their silence as they experimented with their plans that were exposed by James O’Keefe.

And let’s not fail to mention Pfizer’s hard lobbying to stop what they call “dangerous” drug price controls. What’s more dangerous? Stopping a company from ripping off sick people, or charging $225k a year for the blockbuster heart drug Vyndaquel?

What kills more people? That answer is obvious.

[**And we’ll be exposing all of this and the links to our elections with your help.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78956%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dkYZSz7jSS7geaAcZtboKQ&sysid=1)

I’ve been in Washington for over 20 years, so not much shocks me these days, but it may surprise you who took Pfizer political cash as they were pushing out their COVID19 vaccines. And that list is one of the only lists in Washington that includes Pelosi, Schumer, Kevin McCarthy and even Rand Paul.

Your local mayor or state Attorney General may even be on the list.

Pfizer owns almost everyone is Washington.

But they don’t own you, me, James and fighters like us.

[**Help me take a stand and support our work.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78957%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ktYqZILgu4e06F0ZUhTxzg&sysid=1) The sooner we can start, the more impact we can make, and we won’t be stopping anytime soon!

With Respect and Gratitude,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

P.S. Since 2016, American Liberty Fund has produced hundreds of ads seen by millions of Americans. We hit hard as we don’t owe any industry or politicians any breaks. We help elect FIGHTERS who love Liberty and our nation **. . . and we expose everyone who works against you and your family.[Support us today!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78958%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c5v%2bXox7LAfGBqBJmRhHZw&sysid=1)**

P.P.S. Again as a former executive director of Project Veritas, I was with James when it was just a me, him and a few volunteers in a room above a garage. I know James O’Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him **resign in shame.**

John Kasich's recent activities as he has continued to lead with compassion.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=d98afafc843d4e2e8295e603b8fc5db7&_e=Qstn845J6-fQJueAluTTcRlAabkVlBxPKxwpTpLzbkV4IHLU_Hz5uaOwWTdPiS7nhjSb05dcTLBN40VPK9RaS21ePv50sr94Q8FEPVhJ3oEl7cW1tH-WpfVzhxvv3NZiwcsTIwJDsAQodeqsxsoCxQTWRuTDtW7cmRBwuDVTmnLBYQ4KJJ5aUCCVDs_5NxOCpN9r16qZHDE5toquWHeb8g%3D%3D)

Peter, below you'll find a summary of some of Gov. Kasich's recent activities. Thank you for all you do to help us share these updates. We're counting on your continued support! -Team Kasich

**A REAL Immigration Plan for America**
---
Gov. Kasich is on the advisory committee for an organization called Two Paths America, along with former Republican governors, elected officials and thought leaders. They recently released a comprehensive immigration plan for America's leaders to consider. Check it our and let us know what you think. **Solving Our Community-Police Problem**
---
While serving as the Republican governor of Ohio, Gov. Kasich and Democrat State Sen. Nina Turner put aside politics and came together to create a model for police/community relations that should be adopted by other states and the nation. As America deals with the aftermath of yet another tragic death at the hand of police, Gov. Kasich and Sen. Turner co-authored [an op-ed in The Hill](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=d98afafc843d4e2e8295e603b8fc5db7&_e=Qstn845J6-fQJueAluTTcZG6r_h3ud62elV_SaX8rFB2p0K8L0q6tsCOnUXxY-0Que2ToHY5YU66fQoghA75uLdI8IPX0iDu26QVFHMg8YNsW0qrn5uhEdftctOBB7yzF68WyA2Jfv4Jx2io9NbUEt-kNX5XkgJzSmPdcUikJoZseWbNHynUuO4ska9isOiL3vQLeu2mK5zIky_Mf3CqcRQyB4SSjGSx2Nf4dzm0bSgp5Cutmh_zz6vUd9DtXuSb52lFS19lUHQRQYuDFHnHfHbig14SEsixg1CDht-GGO7xuuDEQlTWQSF3XYNtCa3m) calling on our leaders to do more.

conversation about how Biden can use executive action to deliver on
progressive priorities under a divided Congress.

OR Board Chair and Nebraska Party Chair Jane Kleeb will report back from
the DNC where our growing progressive bloc is fighting to ban dark money
from primaries.

Then, we’ll turn to building local power with Alisha Sonnier, candidate in
the upcoming aldermen election in St. Louis, where we have to win a
progressive majority!

And, we’ll get the latest from newly-elected San Francisco Board of Ed
Commissioner Alida Fisher and Jess Nguyen of the San Francisco Education
Alliance.

find more of our video content by subscribing to our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8357?t=1018&akid=4004%2E5885482%2EbUVmdK ]YouTube channel.

broadcast with you!

progressive groups to organize on the outside, and we’ll hear about the
inside strategy from US Rep. Pramila Jayapal on tonight!

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese will host the
discussion with Rep. Jayapal on progressive priorities.

Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8359?t=1022&akid=4004%2E5885482%2EbUVmdK ]Politico this week that the president missed an
opportunity at the State of the Union last week to ‘up the ante’ on
Republicans by threatening to govern more by executive authority.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8360?t=1023&akid=4004%2E5885482%2EbUVmdK ]Join our Federal Action Team to push President Biden to use the power
of the pen to get these done against a divided Congress.

If you love workers and love food, we hope you’ll join us on Valentine’s
Day — tomorrow! — to show some love to restaurant workers.

Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are holding Love Your Server events at
restaurants across the country to show appreciation to those who serve our

Sign up at a Valentine’s event near you, we’d LOVE to see you there!

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.

body:
| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

| | Peter,

Georgia is front and center for everyone these days as we look ahead to 2024.

Not only is the DNC looking at holding the national convention in Atlanta – not only are Democrats eyeing Georgia for greater investments in 2024 – not only did Joe Biden come to Atlanta last month – **_but Vice President Kamala Harris came to Atlanta for her first stop after the State of the Union!_**

It’s clear that the DNC, Joe Biden, and Kamala Harris all see Georgia as the key to winning the White House in 2024.

But here’s the problem: _**so does the GOP.**_

The GOP has been secretly funneling resources to Georgia for months to jumpstart their campaign to flip the state back to red for Donald Trump.

body:

| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7b5f579ae52a476e8a91c4a593e5a6b8&_e=YcSuCFsZDdk1hM6w3HnRFYU0s2I6Ptm7gxdjkba9rmktPWP0xpCjWkVpToFjWe28mjGnIR8GKzPFjwLuEtdX9qsp-TKFP9Tnc8bU3HeeGHbdCGbv7ilOXaSqRB-Yc7b5nFOm4gevY1YlFVAN-0aQsYhiwPdg77vMLmcdtVieYTzjT3Mea1Qftu7l1NBsN61XfdrR-j9llLMyIGGQM3z1fsk-Gkpk2lh2LVStWnt9DgEZZNtEVt9CcT0Nk7AGhX2oA5e4nNzWJnFJ87oZvA204k3JPcJB0-PtEntZv6eHZAY9LI1Fm6AgiXnEYaHuuJ8RkNhmdrZeWmaX03MPaeeFywlgzbY_u_YLyB-EiMrZKh38x5YgJNqeIzXCRCaj6SkbshTowASgdmsarq3J2wvkwqTdpPwC5CC6xmALKzyeeeYX0yNhjd5GKe6g3WzwL2Bi8VTfSomQUbbWfbEPZL9ouKnUgpCAOA4GqVsaSuhBOi8%3D)

Friend,
---
Your new House majority is following through with our promise to prioritize holding the Biden Administration accountable for its many failures.
---
And we are starting with the growing crisis at our southern border.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7b5f579ae52a476e8a91c4a593e5a6b8&_e=YcSuCFsZDdk1hM6w3HnRFYU0s2I6Ptm7gxdjkba9rmktPWP0xpCjWkVpToFjWe28mjGnIR8GKzPFjwLuEtdX9qsp-TKFP9Tnc8bU3HeeGHbdCGbv7ilOXaSqRB-Yc7b5nFOm4gevY1YlFVAN-0aQsYhiwPdg77vMLmcdtVieYTzjT3Mea1Qftu7l1NBsN61XfdrR-j9llLMyIGGQM3z1fsk-Gkpk2lh2LVStWnt9DgEZZNtEVt9CcT0Nk7AGhX2oA5e4nNzWJnFJ87oZvA204k3JPcJB0-PtEntZv6eHZAY9LI1Fm6AgiXnEYaHuuJ8R2T3eLO4BrZYx-vp5CllfL8sEXg4Fn42z7TNbIEG48qcoIYqJT1lG8Xd_xzjp1T7ejDyRsO4n-G6in7b9A2GyXC8XaItXfqkfzbCoPOi1l7Or994UKIAZkN6BvHnwJN1zG-EmJAMKAswmXrAw7I4_LnzKth83R358RO_g8ZN3Uy4%3D)
---
We will no longer let this administration get away with putting our country’s safety at risk for their radical ‘woke’ agenda.
---
And as we work to hold this administration accountable and secure our border once and for all, I had my team commission this poll to hear from YOU about this important issue.
---
**[Please take our Official Border Crisis Flash Poll to share your thoughts on how the Biden Administration has handled our historic border crisis.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7b5f579ae52a476e8a91c4a593e5a6b8&_e=YcSuCFsZDdk1hM6w3HnRFYU0s2I6Ptm7gxdjkba9rmktPWP0xpCjWkVpToFjWe28mjGnIR8GKzPFjwLuEtdX9qsp-TKFP9Tnc8bU3HeeGHbdCGbv7ilOXaSqRB-Yc7b5nFOm4gevY1YlFVAN-0aQsYhiwPdg77vMLmcdtVieYTzjT3Mea1Qftu7l1NBsN61XfdrR-j9llLMyIGGQM3z1fsk-Gkpk2lh2LVStWnt9DgEZZNtEVt9CcT0Nk7AGhX2oA5e4nNzWJnFJ87oZvA204k3JPcJB0-PtEntZv6eHZAY9LI1Fm6AgiXnEYaHuuJ8RQC08soMsIhPG-DpEChaLlScOY-YcOuFJULZKVzflDFr4QxhG_DPq0UP4vFfPA5g2out3grc1sZ9ouYcGFRt08Zzwp7_rVDL7VhwkzmUVJQq5lvKqjfAYmWCmRD3PSbRqY7Df0OkyvPA67eFoQdYzP22ui2O28CD8Y7q5nALora0%3D)**
---

**_Official Border Crisis Poll_ **
**Respondent:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Response Status:** [Pending] **[TAKE THE POLL >>](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7b5f579ae52a476e8a91c4a593e5a6b8&_e=YcSuCFsZDdk1hM6w3HnRFYU0s2I6Ptm7gxdjkba9rmktPWP0xpCjWkVpToFjWe28mjGnIR8GKzPFjwLuEtdX9qsp-TKFP9Tnc8bU3HeeGHbdCGbv7ilOXaSqRB-Yc7b5nFOm4gevY1YlFVAN-0aQsYhiwPdg77vMLmcdtVieYTzjT3Mea1Qftu7l1NBsN61XfdrR-j9llLMyIGGQM3z1fsk-Gkpk2lh2LVStWnt9DgEZZNtEVt9CcT0Nk7AGhX2oA5e4nNzWJnFJ87oZvA204k3JPcJB0-PtEntZv6eHZAY9LI1Fm6AgiXnEYaHuuJ8Rrrif-sgwU2ODASkRW028vtXVnFcvay4sDznDowPGeaoKUpZZMciDnu7VjcuXU42UUMI61xFrBZwgLoz1IfzuEaEWajpttgkrA-Zo4KaodmuA6ZTW6usHVOWRR8IPR8IFltsq0eK5KjrvpsKKtZEi8OVeM2RM2AQPQgQrrXC4R24%3D)**
---

__From over 4.5 million migrant encounters with over 1.2 million known gotaways to the surge of fentanyl crossing our border and becoming the top cause of death among adults, this crisis is out of control.__
---
As much as this administration and other Democrats want to claim our border is secure, the reality is we are reaching historic numbers of illegal migrants and drugs flooding into our country.
---
By continuing to ignore the realities of this crisis, the Biden Administration has put the health and safety of Americans and our country at risk every day.
---
**But it ends now.**
---
We will no longer let the real issues facing this country be ignored by this administration.
---
By taking my poll, you can show the Biden Administration that we will no longer tolerate his open-border policies and blatant disregard for America’s safety.
---
**[So please, take our Official Border Crisis Flash Poll to share your thoughts on how the Biden Administration has handled our historic border crisis.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7b5f579ae52a476e8a91c4a593e5a6b8&_e=YcSuCFsZDdk1hM6w3HnRFYU0s2I6Ptm7gxdjkba9rmktPWP0xpCjWkVpToFjWe28mjGnIR8GKzPFjwLuEtdX9qsp-TKFP9Tnc8bU3HeeGHbdCGbv7ilOXaSqRB-Yc7b5nFOm4gevY1YlFVAN-0aQsYhiwPdg77vMLmcdtVieYTzjT3Mea1Qftu7l1NBsN61XfdrR-j9llLMyIGGQM3z1fsk-Gkpk2lh2LVStWnt9DgEZZNtEVt9CcT0Nk7AGhX2oA5e4nNzWJnFJ87oZvA204k3JPcJB0-PtEntZv6eHZAY9LI1Fm6AgiXnEYaHuuJ8Rq6FuALdo6bM3Ru8Kb2ULiqzD0v3OeADXdmsMI865a9VJ8NC-P8ajLg07h-fgS3cpsmF7zUcaVOgiaa3dW32kYnSYVwLFyOjfhR_Nn_q4yu5s4PLfq7UuxPGh4dgjedQ7af-Vyg-9IhwkVFekcAu2PsUVvdlF8jn1bB0SS0I5Ypo%3D)**
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=7b5f579ae52a476e8a91c4a593e5a6b8&_e=YcSuCFsZDdk1hM6w3HnRFYU0s2I6Ptm7gxdjkba9rmktPWP0xpCjWkVpToFjWe28mjGnIR8GKzPFjwLuEtdX9qsp-TKFP9Tnc8bU3HeeGHbdCGbv7ilOXaSqRB-Yc7b5nFOm4gevY1YlFVAN-0aQsYhiwPdg77vMLmcdtVieYTzjT3Mea1Qftu7l1NBsN61XfdrR-j9llLMyIGGQM3z1fsk-Gkpk2lh2LVStWnt9DgEZZNtEVt9CcT0Nk7AGhX2oA5e4nNzWJnFJ87oZvA204k3JPcJB0-PtEntZv6eHZAY9LI1Fm6AgiXnEYaHuuJ8R5pLdrxZFmuOneiKLZuSAEfO4PKR6t0N9zzQexfhUwHiEMV9UxroyeTG620thu952CwJZsVvVMcxFb46-YoliUCcErbk6Pfu4B5NoM2D2PBPX9ig8j96qaN5ir-K1yDxaihKjW43uGMm3koKlKcaZyk7eZ7RG5gCampyN7RCV62s%3D)

[**Survey: Do you trust Democrats to tell the truth -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bd4f4bce0a74fd093c4356d4c28e1a4&_e=zUlDm15YUqoVpoQgIMYaUn1IjwAEhF0z5vnG8u-5z2arc5zFh_AtNcBE4QhhUdkUuKp9_vr7_u3HLhmjpLTz7i4XQ6HlQPlHj5d4ZWh4YsGVbIMwyN3vlxFoBOnm8qcOFQOImMlZJ-PjZJOwjnDwxmx4Xt_gkubhr2swpscfg-Ky1a62qVUMhprRuHSJR4e-3bqgqpG44sdGYrWeohE4O0Cs0w0313gLl7tvlSE8oeLNrvJLHwaw_4bvwP68YCxzWVMYQijcCK3hmgKtndZwyj43t4sDx3DW3oQ9HVa4zHHRm922zfwMSs06ulmsMeRVJ4n2-hby6Ooq08QlDtZcB6YIrolf0Ghty1W3Bgp5NDhiOl1VgEx0jNbdmeEnQZoWDDGwuWCn-gLM9cv_3xlyzKaj3785qzIIRVmpK2Uu2Vl2JV3-kx9Rc40YIA2iCQvTO8i8VMOt6dOrz0K3JTV0Tw%3D%3D)
Peter,

President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright _bizarre_.

I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington.

They believe Biden’s open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership.

Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden’s speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China.

Really? Does he define “standing up to China” as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month?

If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don’t, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it.

What you won’t hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like:

* letting biological boys compete against girls in sports
* believing men can get pregnant
* open borders, and
* sending free money to able-bodied people who don’t work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us

They’re hiding their real agenda, but I’m glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it.

**[What I’m very curious to know – and why I’m emailing you today – is to find out whether you trust the government. More pointedly, do you trust Democrats to be truthful with you?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bd4f4bce0a74fd093c4356d4c28e1a4&_e=zUlDm15YUqoVpoQgIMYaUn1IjwAEhF0z5vnG8u-5z2arc5zFh_AtNcBE4QhhUdkUuKp9_vr7_u3HLhmjpLTz7i4XQ6HlQPlHj5d4ZWh4YsGVbIMwyN3vlxFoBOnm8qcOFQOImMlZJ-PjZJOwjnDwxmx4Xt_gkubhr2swpscfg-Ky1a62qVUMhprRuHSJR4e-3bqgqpG44sdGYrWeohE4O0Cs0w0313gLl7tvlSE8oeLNrvJLHwaw_4bvwP68YCxzWVMYQijcCK3hmgKtndZwyj43t4sDx3DW3oQ9HVa4zHHRm922zfwMSs06ulmsMeRVX1LL8KqNen-mBdPKBrX4ddfSKDBdU_FSALr3WV4OJGLBFa6R3ZNecwg7G7RpcWXIVeOVTj7syY0H1YvjQvlXdHXXXOZehJ_S_H73e4oxXVgx7uzlwbd5Q7-2Ere8OU4T42hIzGK4cbh5nDOYboN2Qw%3D%3D)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Hi Peter, Recently, I sat down for an interview at my old stomping grounds, WQAD in the Quad Cities, to discuss my first month in Congress and what’s coming in the months ahead. It was good to be home and visit old friends at the station where I served as senior meteorologist. I’ll link to the full video below, but here’s a quick recap of what we talked about:
---
* **Bipartisanship:** My first month has given me hope that there will be opportunities to work across the aisle to find reasonable bipartisan solutions with some of my Republican colleagues.

* **Committees:** I made it clear that I’ll be an advocate for IL-17 on both the Agriculture and the Science, Space, and Technology committees, working to bring funding home and support our local economies.

* **Trust:** I’m doing everything I can to build on the trust I earned as a meteorologist and earn the trust of all my constituents by exceeding their expectations in my role as their voice in Congress.I’ll link to the full video below, but here’s a quick recap of what we talked about:

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, Recently, I sat down for an interview at my old stomping grounds, WQAD in the Quad Cities, to discuss my first month in Congress and what’s coming in the months ahead. It was good to be home and visit old friends at the station where I served as senior meteorologist. I’ll link to the full video below, but here’s a quick recap of what we talked about: Bipartisanship: My first month has given me hope that there will be opportunities to work across the aisle to find reasonable bipartisan solutions with some of my Republican colleagues. Committees: I made it clear that I’ll be an advocate for IL-17 on both the Agriculture and the Science, Space, and Technology committees, working to bring funding home and support our local economies. Trust: I’m doing everything I can to build on the trust I earned as a meteorologist and earn the trust of all my constituents by exceeding their expectations in my role as their voice in Congress.I’ll link to the full video below, but here’s a quick recap of what we talked about: | While I have you, I would appreciate it if you could chip in a $5 donation to our re-election campaign. My first term will go by fast, and we need to start building support now to ward off potential challengers in 2024. ** Your support makes a real difference – so thank you, Peter. Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Sherrod Brown
subject: “GOP eyeing cuts to Social Security”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Over 2.4 million Ohioans rely on Social Security.
That’s not stopping Washington Republicans from wanting to make major cuts to the program.

Business Insider:
“GOP still eyeing cuts to Social Security in debt limit talks”
February 6th, 2023
PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4P-2lnvnxU2qFoNXvAYC5w2]

Senate GOP leaders said they want to hold debt ceiling negotiations hostage -- a move that could send our economy into crisis and devastate the retirement accounts and Social Security payments of working people -- all so they can slash Social Security. One Republican even suggested raising the retirement age.
Republicans are playing political games with working Americans’ livelihoods and their hard-earned retirements.
No matter what kind of work you do, it has dignity -- and that includes the right to retire with dignity. That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about.
That’s why I’m working to not only protect Social Security for future generations; I’m working to strengthen and expand those benefits for people who count on them -- not just seniors but also children and disabled workers.
We need to be united against Republican threats to Social Security, so today, I’m asking you to add your name to mine and show your support for protecting Social Security for working people in Ohio and across the country. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4P-2lnvnxU2qFoNXvAYC5w2]
With gratitude,
Sherrod

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgt86dp7c895a1fs874q34b2to5jja5kjb24fbtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph66pj2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z82t2pid9h6jcva4gj8288tvagonq61v99782rng_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph66pj2cth2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpk8s0t9a8b3bmjbu001b8fjt8j6m6p0er20c4s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph66pj2cth2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zuv3u6mq891qjkdp2tbgqccaq5p1726ge9o9o7t8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6jc0713p84hjrqactods15o8ks4t7s2i1cekgd8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cdj64or6c9jm49fg)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We couldn’t have done this without you – and we cannot do what we need to do in 2023, 2024, and beyond without you too.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58682749/391876815/1232404896?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZTYyNjQzLWVjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3w50Qo6ChKiT-6nJiNQ_qiEJBfZqvj9projYNF5A5kg=&emci=38e62643-ecab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=40e62643-ecab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
| As we approach the one year anniversary of the launch of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, I am overwhelmed with gratitude for your support.

It was a busy, full, and very successful first year. I am thrilled with all that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC accomplished, but I am also well aware that we still have the struggle of our lives yet to come. The science is more clear every year – the climate crisis is human-caused, and any solution requires putting an end to fossil fuels.

But we didn’t need the scientific reports to convince us of the threat we’re facing – heatwaves and droughts, hurricanes and floods, and in my home state of California, the record-setting deadly wildfires.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58682750/391876816/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230213-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZTYyNjQzLWVjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3w50Qo6ChKiT-6nJiNQ_qiEJBfZqvj9projYNF5A5kg=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58682751/391876817/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230213-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZTYyNjQzLWVjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3w50Qo6ChKiT-6nJiNQ_qiEJBfZqvj9projYNF5A5kg=)
---
The good news is that now, finally, a majority of the American public is concerned about climate change. But the majority of the American public are not elected leaders. Those with the power to make the change we need consistently lag behind both science and public opinion.

There are some courageous vocal climate champions, but our leaders are not delivering what the science demands. And even the growing segment of climate champions in elected office often only get half of the equation, promoting much-needed clean, renewable energy while continuing to permit oil and gas development, negating much of the benefits of the clean energy revolution.

That’s where our PAC comes in. In 2022, of the 60 candidates we supported in the general election, 42 of them now hold offices up and down the ballot. To maximize our impact, moving forward, we are investing in growing our capacities to increase our ability to recruit and engage our growing supporter community and much more.

_**[That investment is only possible with your support – will you contribute $10 today to continue your support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC? Every dollar you invest has an impact as we lead the fight against climate change.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58682752/391876819/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230213-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZTYyNjQzLWVjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3w50Qo6ChKiT-6nJiNQ_qiEJBfZqvj9projYNF5A5kg=)**_
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58682753/391876820/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230213-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZTYyNjQzLWVjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3w50Qo6ChKiT-6nJiNQ_qiEJBfZqvj9projYNF5A5kg=)

We couldn’t have done this without you – and we cannot do what we need to do in 2023, 2024, and beyond without you too. I am under no illusions that electing real climate leaders and then driving the needed change will be easy. But I know that it is the most important thing we must do, and I do believe that together, we _can_ do it. We can win.

Gratefully,

clean_body: We couldn’t have done this without you – and we cannot do what we need to do in 2023, 2024, and beyond without you too. | | As we approach the one year anniversary of the launch of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, I am overwhelmed with gratitude for your support. It was a busy, full, and very successful first year. I am thrilled with all that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC accomplished, but I am also well aware that we still have the struggle of our lives yet to come. The science is more clear every year – the climate crisis is human-caused, and any solution requires putting an end to fossil fuels. But we didn’t need the scientific reports to convince us of the threat we’re facing – heatwaves and droughts, hurricanes and floods, and in my home state of California, the record-setting deadly wildfires. = | = The good news is that now, finally, a majority of the American public is concerned about climate change. But the majority of the American public are not elected leaders. Those with the power to make the change we need consistently lag behind both science and public opinion. There are some courageous vocal climate champions, but our leaders are not delivering what the science demands. And even the growing segment of climate champions in elected office often only get half of the equation, promoting much-needed clean, renewable energy while continuing to permit oil and gas development, negating much of the benefits of the clean energy revolution. That’s where our PAC comes in. In 2022, of the 60 candidates we supported in the general election, 42 of them now hold offices up and down the ballot. To maximize our impact, moving forward, we are investing in growing our capacities to increase our ability to recruit and engage our growing supporter community and much more. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We couldn’t have done this without you – and we cannot do what we need to do in 2023, 2024, and beyond without you too. I am under no illusions that electing real climate leaders and then driving the needed change will be easy. But I know that it is the most important thing we must do, and I do believe that together, we can do it. We can win. Gratefully, Jane Fonda = P.S. | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Brad Pfaff
subject: Clean Water for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for State Senate
body:
Wisconsinites should feel confident that they can go to their sink, turn on their tap, and have access to a glass of water. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58682868/391877388/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&refcode=em_230213_cleanwater&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZmNDVmMC1lZGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBJqsBBwEjSwEUB1ojpbK7JZFCPVK54TH75MSFPc5tc=) | Friend, Wisconsinites should feel confident that they can go to their sink, turn on their tap, and have access to a glass of water. **But right now, that’s not the case for many of our neighbors. ** Many towns right now are being affected by PFAS and toxic contaminants in their water. Clean water and air is a growing problem in our state, and I’m proud to be part of the fight in tackling this crisis. [**Can you chip in to my re-election campaign so that we can elect a WI House dedicated to clean water and air for our communities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58682869/391877389/2116796355?amount=15&refcode=em_230213_cleanwater&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZmNDVmMC1lZGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBJqsBBwEjSwEUB1ojpbK7JZFCPVK54TH75MSFPc5tc=) Our environment and the health of our communities have always been a priority for me, and they have especially been at the top of my mind as we work to overhaul toxic water contaminants in many communities here in our 32nd District. I’m working to make sure every Wisconsinite has access to clean, safe water by supporting measures that: 💧 Increase PFAS testing, sampling, and monitoring
💧 Increase available resources for on-the-ground partners
💧 Increase awareness about the dangers of PFAS We need to get this done for our communities, and I’m working hard to ensure the health and safety of _everyone_.****[**Friend, ****it’s going to take grassroots power to make it happen, so if you’re with me can you chip in whatever you can to help power my fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58682870/391877390/2116796355?amount=15&refcode=em_230213_cleanwater&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZmNDVmMC1lZGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBJqsBBwEjSwEUB1ojpbK7JZFCPVK54TH75MSFPc5tc=) | [CHIP IN $15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58682871/391877391/-304458161?amount=15&refcode=em_230213_cleanwater&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZmNDVmMC1lZGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBJqsBBwEjSwEUB1ojpbK7JZFCPVK54TH75MSFPc5tc=)
---
Thank you,
Brad Pfaff
* * *
Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! clean_body: Wisconsinites should feel confident that they can go to their sink, turn on their tap, and have access to a glass of water. | = | Friend, Wisconsinites should feel confident that they can go to their sink, turn on their tap, and have access to a glass of water. But right now, that’s not the case for many of our neighbors. Many towns right now are being affected by PFAS and toxic contaminants in their water. Clean water and air is a growing problem in our state, and I’m proud to be part of the fight in tackling this crisis. = Our environment and the health of our communities have always been a priority for me, and they have especially been at the top of my mind as we work to overhaul toxic water contaminants in many communities here in our 32nd District. I’m working to make sure every Wisconsinite has access to clean, safe water by supporting measures that: 💧 Increase PFAS testing, sampling, and monitoring 💧 Increase available resources for on-the-ground partners 💧 Increase awareness about the dangers of PFAS We need to get this done for our communities, and I’m working hard to ensure the health and safety of everyone.**= | = Thank you, Brad Pfaff Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! = Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about Brad's campaign to advocate for working families! However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . | Paid for by Pfaff for State Senate Pfaff for Congress PO Box 684 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States

He calls wokeness **" the greatest domestic threat to America today,"** and he's right.

This pervasive ideology has found its way into every institution and facet of American life, from schools to the boardroom.

Republicans can't just play nice as the left pushes wokeness on the American people. **We need people in the Senate who aren 't afraid to fight back. **

clean_body: I have a personal request | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, it’s hard to believe today marks 8 days until Election Day. As we inch towards the finish line, I have a personal request for you: | | It’s easy to think that one dollar — or one vote, or one volunteer — won’t make a big difference. But if everyone reading this email chipped in just $1, we’d be in the best position possible to make history next week! With just over one week until Election Day, your $1 will bolster our door knocking efforts, hire organizers to spread our message, and get us across the finish line next Tuesday! If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Jennifer McClellan and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thanks for stepping up, — Jenn McClellan The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94071e154fc84812b91d2a6d7b869c34&_e=Drt_7Y3kiGtMNG80iCNchGEzwU2rvYDULoY65UAUIHhxajZ37fBH2zvjpaaYbanmNQMvpr6tkhoxrka7bwniPNL_XESHggGi4NAwPz96loGJXiAh9l0J69ZR5DUgWafG3mXphCiysPhfTxXggmaM96Lt04X889HIov82KfwFDBqmx1QY0LArOsXv6s_S3Tn2hDYzVXvjFVXH7aFovtI_xuyBibwRbGCy36R7dRqgLykaG1jXn2wYUNiiIDa_z-IbChAKMqqkb7kG719n-mRAnopRatyzt0GaJ0DmNdy-dRShGElZ9YIvA27R6Y_rJ9bbp0bK6noSqe9g5mdgKOs6dbzVMJkryIth5mBeqhij0PrwTStXU82Q2YDtUuhGmOFk-a3IxlfavoBad6XE3CvybaeDq_pjAUBlTPb4myilcGTyKGOx7Gjdfk3U9_vGr5YCczTcmlqRMXJtJMD6RbUhHA%3D%3D)

name: Team TNDP
subject: fwd: Republican Control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

Tennessee has been under Republican control for over a decade. Let’s take a look at where that’s gotten us, shall we?

Compared to other states, Tennessee is:
• #1 in medical bankruptcies
• #44 in education funding
• #1 in rural hospital closures
• #45 in working conditions

That’s not to mention the minimal worker protections we have, including zero laws mandating paid leave. Oh, and we have some of the highest infant and maternal mortality rates in the nation. You’re getting the point here, right?

We’re tired of seeing the people of TN suffer under a government that refuses to support us, no matter how far we fall. That’s why we're building now to mount a strong fight against Republicans in 2024. Will you join us by donating now?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Gaining power against the Republicans like Marsha Blackburn is far from easy. We have the experience and knowledge to go up against them. What we need now are the resources necessary to win. That’s where you come in.

Can you donate $10 right now to help us gain the resources we need to elect Democrats who will fight for working people? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Together, we can pick Tennessee up and create a better future for all.

Team TNDP

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.

body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1665%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EHkBQPJAp0jm1jO5xIn7Gw&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659894%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VUMzTL68otVAk9d8Vlq4ZQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=39b6XJB3NcWIdubqq62WEA&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Within weeks of James releasing that report, his organization, Project Veritas, is in disarray and James' board of directors has placed him on paid leave.

**It 's no coincidence that this occurred right after they exposed one of the largest industries in the world. These people will CRUSH anyone who stands in their way.**

[**I 'm asking for your help to expose Pfizer's power in politics by funding a series of ads that . . . . TELLS . . . . THE . . .TRUTH.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5kigh0i8aoi95rsu4r6sh7q9or081mvg7f97t0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph61or3cph2bs)

[**Please donate today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2q1e8ks4hjmtt1svsmfgs11junncudufiv0sv2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph61or3cph2bs)

I take this very personally. James is a friend and I'm one of the first executive directors of Project Veritas, helping James get the organization off the ground and thriving for seven years.

As a Marine Corps veteran, our motto "Semper Fidelis" - "Always Faithful" will always ring true in my heart when applied to the Corps, my family and my friends.

In politics, there is an infinitesimally small group of men and women who are true believers that fight for Liberty. We're not in it for the money, fame, power, etc. Most of us try and stay under the radar so we can support each other without the distractions of the media or attacks by the Left (they always still come every once in a while).

**We are a small group, and we are family - and always faithful to each other. **

Mess with one of us, **and you mess with all of us.**

Now, my SuperPAC, American Liberty Fund, is jumping into this fight with everything we have.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can't say it's surprising. During the height of the pandemic, Pfizer dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

From town mayors to U.S. Senators, checks were cut from Pfizer to buy their silence as they experimented with their plans that were exposed by James O'Keefe.

And let's not fail to mention Pfizer's hard lobbying to stop what they call "dangerous" drug price controls. What's more dangerous? Stopping a company from ripping off sick people, or charging $225k a year for the blockbuster heart drug Vyndaquel?

What kills more people? That answer is obvious.

[**And we 'll be exposing all of this and the links to our elections with your help.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdbtecgdv23nnvdfft20vlal56j0j4m7lai6mgc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph61or3cph2bs)

I've been in Washington for over 20 years, so not much shocks me these days, but it may surprise you who took Pfizer political cash as they were pushing out their COVID19 vaccines. And that list is one of the only lists in Washington that includes Pelosi, Schumer, Kevin McCarthy and even Rand Paul.

Your local mayor or state Attorney General may even be on the list.

Pfizer owns almost everyone is Washington.

But they don't own you, me, James and fighters like us.

[**Help me take a stand and support our work.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlc8p4hmktgd52rgben1v5jftj0oljhoobbbqjb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph61or3cph2bs) The sooner we can start, the more impact we can make, and we won't be stopping anytime soon!

With Respect and Gratitude,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

P.S. Since 2016, American Liberty Fund has produced hundreds of ads seen by millions of Americans. We hit hard as we don't owe any industry or politicians any breaks. We help elect FIGHTERS who love Liberty and our nation **. . . and we expose everyone who works against you and your family.[Support us today!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z04mvvkimvk42hb8h4lo1k83gpdile14krm1716o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cph61or3cph2bs)**

P.P.S. Again as a former executive director of Project Veritas, I was with James when it was just a me, him and a few volunteers in a room above a garage. I know James O'Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him **resign in shame.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How to defend the free market in the 21st century
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132812?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
The free market is in retreat around the world. We might like to think of America as a land of limited government. In reality, there has been a remarkable expansion in the size of the state in the past decade or so.

The odd thing is that this retreat by the free market has all happened at a time when there have never been more organisations dedicated to defending it. Why? What do we need to do to turn back the tide of big government?

My new article in the Spectator that looks at what we need to do to win the battle of ideas in the 21st Century. You can read it by clicking [here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=87c786e5f2&e=5703353baa)
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=be98b71548&e=5703353baa)
---
| In years gone by, Rush Limbaugh used radio to present a conservative analysis of current affairs to millions of Americans. In my article, I outline my thoughts on how a new generation of conservatives might do so in future.

America, I argue in my article, is the liberty greatest cause for optimism. Despite the growth of government, many southern states – like Mississippi - have moved in the opposite direction, eliminating red tape and cutting taxes.

As the traditional business clusters centered around New York, Chicago and California have faltered, states run along more free-market lines have flourished. From Texas to Tennessee and Florida, a ‘new South’ has emerged.

Free market Southern states are not only a rebuke to the more statist states. Their success provides a model that others will eventually have to follow.

My article concludes with the observation that ....
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3263f3e76d&e=5703353baa)
---
| I hope you find my article of interest.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5f0997ebe0&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58665584/391839015/1127829777?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230213_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjNjMzgzYi1jOGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SGP1mvmqJF8ibQcquv3YMCtPra_hR4jIkywIV_fV_yU=) Folks, Last week, I was honored to sit in the House chambers during President Biden’s State of the Union Address. America is reemerging under President Biden’s leadership. We’re taking action on climate change. We’re creating millions of new jobs. Unemployment is at its lowest level in more than 50 years. World leaders see the United States as a trusted ally again. We have a lot to be proud of — but there’s still work to do. President Biden talked about rebuilding the economy for blue-collar workers during his speech. It made me think about my time working in construction. 100-degree days laying gravel. Digging foundations. Sunrise to sunset. Putting in a hard day’s work but not being able to make ends meet. I know that’s still the reality for too many hardworking Coloradans. We need to keep investing in our communities so everybody can achieve their American Dream. We have a once-in-a-generation chance to invest in our communities and move our country forward. _I’m all in to help make that happen._ **[I’ve always gone where the fight is. I’m not going to stop now.
