name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I need your personal endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: [**I need your personal endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58665573/391839002/1547604405?source=20230213_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDNjMzgzYi1jOGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WutV7oTxc8mPhuaKlqF8vqE8l0_ppwJGvbA_yGOE9zQ=&emci=c706b65e-8fa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7d3c383b-c8ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) [_**If you already believe in me and my campaign, you can go ahead and sign your name here. If you’re not sure yet, let me explain and fight for your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58665574/391839003/1547604405?source=20230213_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDNjMzgzYi1jOGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WutV7oTxc8mPhuaKlqF8vqE8l0_ppwJGvbA_yGOE9zQ=&emci=c706b65e-8fa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=7d3c383b-c8ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) Peter, I need you to understand my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream -- and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. Now, Trump’s Republicans are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about protecting our taking back our House Majority from their attacks, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. [_**It’s because of my upbringing that I believe all Americans deserve a fighting chance. That’s why I’m leading the charge to make sure our hardworking Democrats take back our Majority \-- but I need to make sure my supporters have my back as I do. name: Team Slotkin
subject: The MIGOP said “Hold my beer”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Team -
If one thing is clear, it’s that the Michigan GOP did not learn any lessons from 2022.
In elections across the country, voters made it clear that they are tired of extremism. Here in Michigan, candidates that campaigned on fear and division were overwhelmingly rejected at the ballot box.
An opinion piece in the Livingston Post summed it up: _“Here in Livingston County, the Republicans apparently looked at the election results, asked for volunteers to hold their beer, and doubled down in the culture wars by moving way, way, right.”_
But, rather than hearing this feedback, looking at the data, and changing their approach – it seems as though the Michigan GOP is doubling down ahead of their upcoming convention, where new party leadership will be chosen.
Last month, former President Trump endorsed Matt DePerno in the race for the new chairman of the Michigan Republican Party. As a reminder, Matt DePerno ran for Michigan Attorney General last year, campaigning on conspiracy theories about the 2020 election, and was accused of trying to steal voting machines. Michigan voters rejected him by over 375,000 votes.
On top of that, a new $50 registration fee has been implemented for delegates at the convention. It’s a symbol of how the party is faring. Not only are they struggling to come up with votes, they’re also unable to raise resources from traditional sources who are fed up with the more extreme direction of the party.
If there’s one thing we learned on the ground last year, it’s that Michiganders are desperately looking for Team Normal. It’s how Elissa won in one of the most competitive races in the country by her largest ever margin of victory. [**As the Michigan GOP continues down the path of extremism, chip in below to help us continue to be the voice of reason voters are looking for.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb23.fIJRPL&refcode=em230213-1-20000&t=1&akid=14%2E135344%2ED-YqtW)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb23.fIJRPL&refcode=em230213-1-20000&t=2&akid=14%2E135344%2ED-YqtW)**
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=14%2E135344%2ED-YqtW).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

subject: HB 1333
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Sign up to testify AGAINST this BAD BILL by 3PM TODAY!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh6kaahhckf7ehoq9heffchtrfp904vf4g4fnlpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuv638l8j9mdbiflnhifsvc9dnq67en6e8hmm9vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7e7hskkug0qr0k4q2d7al32pvuggltl6q32vt9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6rvgvf0v557666d8e95odcgs0dpi2ees299drf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsqr9q48vdfg070kvp2p1kqbii8ord8bbp5ahd3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zisu70i4cec673aopvnb1s0mijuih87oomdd934o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0v25lrhfbhonita0sb2m6q9gvecbj487b5ah6vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh7fdo2keikdlhgod7vjtus0la4325oejghq5mm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zteliencbclrdodnnuk9nh1sd3gpibh26843mavg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdbdm3shsk68tp0ioovgvaobh38cbrduothnlqi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zep6tb37ko9iccku68kj2egpndt1iv8pqoqk81jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedvcpch26etdjdgl7sler4rj2v7mfll9lvtj8a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpj60o36c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

Now that we did: Karine, I can’t wait to dig into some delicious Philadelphia cheesesteaks (and am happy to lend you my jersey for you to show off your new favorite team at the podium!).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: IL GOP Chair delays quarterly meeting, moves to virtual
body:
Claiming "scheduling conflicts," the move of the meeting to virtual may be a fear of grassroots conservatives spreading COVID-19 to the leadership.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/1c55d2f6a8dd/alert-il-gop-chair-delays-quarterly-meeting-moves-to-virtual?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

March GOP State Central Committee Meeting Now Virtual: Is Don Tracy Afraid of the Grassroots or the Spread of COVID-19? (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/march-gop-state-central-committee-meeting-now-virtual-is-don-tracy-afraid-of-the-grassroots-or-the-spread-of-covid-19.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The Illinois Republican State Central Committee, the governing board of the Republican party, meets once a quarter at various locations across Illinois, and in August on Republican Day during the Illinois State Fair.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/march-gop-state-central-committee-meeting-now-virtual-is-don-tracy-afraid-of-the-grassroots-or-the-spread-of-covid-19.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden wears two masks on October 13, 2020. (Carolyn Kaster/AP)

The last SSC meeting was in December in Bolingbrook where the IL GOP spent several hours disrespecting the grassroots – and at one point during the meeting, Vince Kolber (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , chairman of the finance committee, questioned why anyone from the conservative grassroots base of the party was there who hadn’t donated to the IL GOP.

In other words, if you don’t donate to the party, then your voice doesn’t
matter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

But interestingly enough, Illinois Review discovered that a majority of Kolber’s colleagues on the
SSC (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/according-to-records-il-gop-leaders-give-very-little-money-or-not-at-all.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) don’t donate to the IL GOP either.

And while serving as a senior leader of the IL GOP and not donating a penny to the organization is certainly a bad optic – it’s not nearly as bad as Don Tracy donating to a
Democratic candidate (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) endorsed by liberal US Sen. Dick Durbin and US Rep. Cherie Bustos, a friend and ally of former Democratic US House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, just months before his election as chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois.

But this should come as no surprise because after all, Tracy did run in the 2002 Illinois Primary as a
Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . And in 2020, during the height of the pandemic, Tracy’s family-owned business, Dot Foods, where he is an owner, donated (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden.

And just last week, Illinois Review has learned that at the same time Dot Foods owners were donating to Biden in 2020, they were simultaneously launching a
#WhyIMask (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-promoted-whyimask-face-mask-campaign-during-pandemic.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) campaign, and encouraging employees to submit photos wearing a mask.
https://www.facebook.com/dotfoodscareers/photos/3082248705205360?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Dot Foods launches a #WhyIMask campaign during the pandemic. The family-owned business is owned by twelve siblings, including IL GOP chairman Don Tracy. (Facebook/Dot Foods Careers)

In one Facebook post, the official Dot Foods Careers page encourages employees to submit photos, asking,

“We’d love to know who you wear a mask for!”

The post also encourages employees to submit their photos to the email address “thankyou@dotfoods.com,” along with a “photo of you wearing your mask OR a photo of you with the people you wear a mask for.”

The post also encourages employees to write “a sentence or two about why you wear a mask.”

The next SSC meeting was scheduled for this month in Springfield, but Illinois Review has recently learned that the in-person February meeting has been rescheduled for March – and this next meeting is virtual.

Tracy, who serves as the Chief Executive Officer of the SSC and presides over SSC meetings, if asked, will tell you that there were “scheduling conflicts” – and that’s why the meeting was pushed back a month and is virtual instead of in-person.

But perhaps, Tracy is afraid of the conservative grassroots base of the party showing up at the next in-person meeting, and that’s why it’s virtual.

Or the most probable scenario – Tracy is afraid of the grassroots showing up in-person and spreading COVID-19 – and that’s why he prefers a virtual meeting instead.

It’s not accidental that Tracy’s decision to host a virtual meeting coincides with Gov. JB Pritzker’s latest COVID-19 emergency order.

On February 3rd, Gov. Pritzker extended his COVID-19 emergency powers and issued his 39th
Gubernatorial Disaster Proclamation (https://www.illinois.gov/content/dam/soi/en/web/illinois/documents/government/coronavirus-disaster-proc-02-03-23.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , declaring that the State of Illinois is still a “disaster area” and that Illinois is still in the midst of a “public health emergency.”
https://www.illinois.gov/content/dam/soi/en/web/illinois/documents/government/coronavirus-disaster-proc-02-03-23.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Gov. JB Pritzker's latest COVID-19 Emergency Order, signed Feb. 3, 2023, the 39th such executive order.

The emergency order encourages Illinoisans to “socially distance” and to continue wearing “face coverings” to slow the spread of the virus.

“WHEREAS, social distancing, face coverings, and other public health precautions have proven to be critical in slowing and stopping the spread of COVID-19, especially when community spread of the disease is high...”

The proclamation also encourages minimizing physical contact with the unvaccinated – actions “critical” to slowing the spread of the virus.

“WHEREAS public health guidance advises that minimizing physical interactions between people who are not fully vaccinated and who do not reside in the same household is critical to slowing the spread of COVID-19...”

The proclamation is in effect until March 4, 2023.

In January, Illinois Review uncovered a
Facebook thread (https://www.facebook.com/forced_account_switch?next=https%3A%2F%2Fm.facebook.com%2Fstory.php%3Fstory_fbid%3Dpfbid02CLCsV6mMNEkv3F8kCoZEHrM93ELEAUVW5dQqKC3pwXPfaXMdFErkiCLFzTkRv5UKl%26id%3D1398842833%26sfnsn%3Dmo%26mibextid%3DYsHG2a&_rdr&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) from a year ago, where Chicago GOP chairman Stephen Boulton – a close friend and advisor to Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , offers some shocking admissions when it comes to the unvaccinated population, writing,

“I find it unfathomable that people are risking their lives to dodge two little shots....Now a lot of people are going to die for nothing but ‘principle’ grounded in ignorance – or, even worse, politics.”

Boulton also borrowed a line from Joe Biden and the Democrats by blaming the unvaccinated, saying,

“We have people who won’t get the vaccine, creating the problem now.”

Boulton also believes that if an unvaccinated person gets sick – you pay for the hundreds of thousands of dollars in potential hospital costs out of your own pocket – don’t make the insurers or the vaccinated pay for your bill.

Boulton also strongly believes and complained “that fortunes in avoidable hospital medical expenses are being wasted on saving people who shouldn’t be in those ICUs..”

In other words, saving the life of an unvaccinated human being is “wasteful spending.”
https://m.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=pfbid02CLCsV6mMNEkv3F8kCoZEHrM93ELEAUVW5dQqKC3pwXPfaXMdFErkiCLFzTkRv5UKl&id=1398842833&sfnsn=mo&mibextid=YsHG2a&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

If Boulton is advising Tracy, then it’s no surprise that Tracy prefers a virtual meeting next month. It’s also consistent with Tracy’s actions over the last few years – including the actions of his company where he is an owner.

And Tracy has yet to condemn Boulton for his comments attacking the unvaccinated. He remains silent on the issue when asked for a comment.

But perhaps at the virtual meeting next month, Tracy can recommend a #WhyIMask campaign funded by the IL GOP. And perhaps his best friend Boulton can serve as the chair of that campaign.

With so much at stake, and school board races just around the corner – the responsibilities demand an in-person meeting. But it appears that Tracy is more concerned with stopping the spread of COVID than he is stopping the spread of socialist, Democratic policies.
https://youtu.be/vsXz7I15mmE?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e410767c05-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_13_05_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-e410767c05-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Peter, Banning gas stoves is just another example in the long list of LEFTIST LUNACY coming from the coastal elites – this has been on the back burner of the radicals’ anti-American agenda for some time now. This isn’t about “gas stoves” or the safety of our families... It’s about **CONTROL**. **Plain and simple**. Let me know you won’t back down from the hypocritical bullies!

Friend, _**"Division"**_ was the theme of last Tuesday's State of the Union address. President Biden promised to be a unifying president, but he chooses to be a divider. He says all the right things, but his actions speak louder than his words. From the botched Afghanistan withdrawal to a crippled economy and continuous partisanship – Joe Biden's presidency has been deeply divisive. _**Governor Larry Hogan had this to say about Biden's SOTU address:**_

**YOUR REPUBLICAN MEMBERSHIP HAS BEEN SUSPENDED**

---

Friend,

**3.** We’re rounding up 100 top PA Democrats to stop this MAGA takeover in its tracks, before it’s too late!

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58671227/391851526/571695245?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230213_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2QwYzQ0ZC1kMWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMQUaOeApK4RmbSKyVoXIK3YCR4OeK3WyMTls8B3HiI=) Hi, Michael said I should reach out. I’m up for re-election in 2024, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. (_There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_ NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent. In fact, 2023 has just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me. [**Frankly, this is going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Michael Bennet’s as we begin the new year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58671229/391851528/571695245?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230213_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2QwYzQ0ZC1kMWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMQUaOeApK4RmbSKyVoXIK3YCR4OeK3WyMTls8B3HiI=) I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families. I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do. Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by. That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you. [**I need you in this fight, too. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26 -- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58671232/391851530/571695245?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230213_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2QwYzQ0ZC1kMWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMQUaOeApK4RmbSKyVoXIK3YCR4OeK3WyMTls8B3HiI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58671234/391851532/571695245?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230213_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2QwYzQ0ZC1kMWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMQUaOeApK4RmbSKyVoXIK3YCR4OeK3WyMTls8B3HiI=)******

clean_body: Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground. | = Hi, Michael said I should reach out. I’m up for re-election in 2024, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. (There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.) NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent. In fact, 2023 has just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me. = I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families. I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do. Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by. That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** With gratitude, Sherrod Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Giffords
subject: The NRA is continuing to lose influence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In 2018, the NRA had 5.5 million members. But since its 2019 corruption scandal, NRA membership now stands at just 4.3 million members.
#

Friends -
New reporting reveals that the NRA has taken a massive hit to their membership due to the corruption allegations against its CEO and Executive Vice President, Wayne LaPierre.
In 2018, the NRA had 5.5 million members. But since its 2019 corruption scandal, NRA membership now stands at just 4.3 million members. This is the smallest it has been since 2012.
**This report makes it clear: the NRA is continuing to lose influence.**
More people are realizing that the corporate gun lobby stands for profit above all else. But after years of pushing dangerous rhetoric and creating a culture of fear, it’s going to take all of us to keep fighting back against the harmful impact that the gun lobby has made on our country.
A big part of being able to fight back against the NRA is meeting our fundraising goals. In just two days, we’re facing our February mid-month fundraising deadline, and as of now we’re pacing behind where we need to be.
[**So we’re asking you today: Will you please make your first online contribution to Giffords PAC? Your contribution gives us the resources we need to stand up against the gun lobby’s dark influence on our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230213-1-15&t=1&akid=4254%2E3935704%2EOJirwA)

Peter, When folks ask me if I think Democrats can win in North Carolina in 2024, I tell them this: **North Carolina is the epitome of a “purple” state.** We have 7 Democratic representatives to the U.S. House, and 7 Republican representatives. In 2020, Donald Trump’s narrowest victory came here. He won North Carolina by just 1.3 points. I won my gubernatorial elections in the same years that Trump carried the state. **Democrats CAN win here — if we have the resources that allow us to compete.** **[Donate before midnight to help our team invest in Democratic candidates who can win!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58673601/391853628/435245919?refcode=ea.dff3330a-d4ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.dff3330a-d4ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmYzMzMwYS1kNGFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUgfACGo010m8qTP2cuy8XJNzQ_g-x5MZg7VPjJI1Tc=)** _But you need to know that future elections in NC may be rigged against our party._ The right-wing state Supreme Court is set to reopen cases that could reinstate anti-voter legislation and Republicans’ gerrymandered legislative district maps. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: 8 days to another House seat? If Jennifer McClellan wins the special election on the 21st, it’s the first of many steps to taking back the House from Kevin McCarthy & Marjorie Taylor Greene’s GOP.
body:
Virginia special House election
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ba63ad9-747d-4974-9fad-bad3c5dfb9ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you gotten a chance to pitch in for this special election? We know you have a lot going on (we get it!) and we know it can be hard to keep track of it all if we don’t catch you at just the right time. But this off-season race is important, because ... [**We Have Less than Two Weeks To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec6098cb-6e47-42ff-b239-6d6e5d1482c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In 8 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a8320c9-1ff9-4755-9ffb-9c71de604f48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ **_We must ensure that in 8 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not this nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T635cf5e8-fc33-459c-a8d8-b6261919d000/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45a6fd69-a945-4602-9e3b-7aec287b910f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jennifermcclellan-vahouserace15-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fbe6bc7-45eb-47c5-8fc8-039ae84d3aa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Kirsten (via UniteDemocrats)
subject: My hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter, she might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice _matters_ — and that her advocacy can make a difference. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58677238/391855550/908117046?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230213_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlNjlmZWUwLWQ2YWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p6QloyAteUic5bbAegrBAiaEQccCnS692r1v-R6Khk8=) In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice.

That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one and to take on the toughest fights in Washington and stand up for what’s right.

Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care. I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me.

But I need _your_ help, Peter. With so much at stake, Democrats are hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake control — and after New York Republicans secured historic victories across the state during the midterm elections, the GOP is targeting me for defeat.

**I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs. My fight is fueled by you and for you. But that means I can’t take on the GOP’s megadonor machine and keep this seat blue without your grassroots support.**

name: Analicia Martinez, Team Hoyle
subject: The question I’ve heard a lot lately. (And my answer)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58677420/391855648/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJjOTcwOC1kN2FiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ElmcTRSD6o_cV8AT-QdkY04N2ddRUtr8B8t9iG_VAfk=&emci=44554685-c2ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b5bc9708-d7ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Hey there Peter, My name is Analicia Martinez, and I'm thrilled to introduce myself to you as Val's new campaign manager. If you're asking "didn't we just _finish_ a campaign?" you're not the first. I've heard that a lot already. The fact is, the same handful of billionaires and special interests that spent millions attempting to defeat Val last year are already laying groundwork to try to take this seat in 2024. [**Will you donate $3 to kickstart our grassroots movement so Val can keep fighting for us in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58677421/391855649/-1599294071?refcode=2023-02-13-analicia&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b5bc9708-d7ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJjOTcwOC1kN2FiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ElmcTRSD6o_cV8AT-QdkY04N2ddRUtr8B8t9iG_VAfk=) After just a few short weeks, it's already clear why they're so fixated on Val (and why so many people have been a part of this movement since Day One): Val works as hard as anyone I've ever met, speaks truth to power, and never backs down from a fight. **Above all, she's always focused on making sure our government answers to working families, not the wealthy and well-connected.** Unfortunately, that's tougher than it sounds. Congress has more than its share of ideologues and con artists who will go as far as _supporting an insurrection_ if it makes their big donors and extremist base happy. And those donors and extremists are targeting Val. **Here's what that means: We're in for another tough race, Peter.** But the good news is that we know southwest Oregon, and we know that the folks here support Val. We know how to organize. We know how to listen to the people in our communities. We know how to get our message out. And we know that if we want to keep this seat in the people's hands, we need to get to work _now_. clean_body: | | | | Hey there Peter, My name is Analicia Martinez, and I'm thrilled to introduce myself to you as Val's new campaign manager. If you're asking "didn't we just finish a campaign?" you're not the first. I've heard that a lot already. The fact is, the same handful of billionaires and special interests that spent millions attempting to defeat Val last year are already laying groundwork to try to take this seat in 2024. = After just a few short weeks, it's already clear why they're so fixated on Val (and why so many people have been a part of this movement since Day One): Val works as hard as anyone I've ever met, speaks truth to power, and never backs down from a fight. Above all, she's always focused on making sure our government answers to working families, not the wealthy and well-connected. Unfortunately, that's tougher than it sounds. Congress has more than its share of ideologues and con artists who will go as far as supporting an insurrection if it makes their big donors and extremist base happy. And those donors and extremists are targeting Val. Here's what that means: We're in for another tough race, Peter. But the good news is that we know southwest Oregon, and we know that the folks here support Val. We know how to organize. We know how to listen to the people in our communities. We know how to get our message out. And we know that if we want to keep this seat in the people's hands, we need to get to work now. = Analicia Analicia Martinez Campaign Manager, Team Hoyle | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

body:
Joe Biden's speech was shameful | House Republicans are committed to putting America FIRST. Joe Biden puts America LAST. During his State of the Union Address, Biden LIED to the American People...
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a87dacd2813f462ca0d9390eb18f0a07&_e=xbRzzQTeRSUZeDW4e-QjjtKiaooxi9hVEGPtCV39lJ9Qq1To1MjW8xfyVzE2OrzIanGocOgrfXJtUOFJdc809ZQhY9ih6mWydW3PxCvd9zNnTJddo4g61mchhX1oeXV01mTe3ZlUR4m_2HsW2Cf7GDI1b3kMp_IXVa1Y7L6gAoCd5Jy6_DJl2F-nAo3B-X_q7uN12hBfzy0YBLsg9WZMHSE1uWBwx5adYwV-vDvEX18EV74LD202gq4NeCwoap1jLPSIX7ynsCMXQgFzQtxqPN54csyJT5T9qepwtmLz8DlaRr_iUODktNPoEiDHkPNoEXtbtRdmCYxZ95funb4cbkPuzv3YNHlF7alZc4YayGclOvmSGMVBKjsWsKs5Tb3Fiie4ho-g-EI_1qAPy7GRQtFSHAvyi5k6L9n705Z981VjwOG9A9feIjDAUuhQ60s3f63xpEHnrF4HpmLD9_JAbWnAFzh9DjTFyW2aoiqzeU73-9FjPPDwKoAxuR_iChGoCtRw3VSnK1F_9CkssQ2__m26IEBE0yzMUXfk74CSLDU%3D)

Friend,
House Republicans are committed to putting America FIRST. _**Joe Biden puts America LAST.**_

clean_body: | | Peter – did you see this? the Intercept reports on Kyrsten Sinema’s troubling ties to the payday lending industry —including $175,000 in contributions, the most of any active U.S. Senator. Payday loans are especially predatory because lenders charge exorbitant fees with interest rates as high as 400 percent for short-term loans. Sinema proves time and again she can’t be trusted to put Arizona first. The piece also outlines how Sinema repeatedly went to bat for the payday industry as a senator, actively working against the Consumer Protection Financial Bureau’s efforts to rein in payday lenders' predatory behaviors to protect borrowers. She also failed to disclose her business dealings with a payday lending lobbyist. Sinema’s ties to the sleazy, exploitative payday industry directly hurt her own constituents. But she’s never put her constituents above special interests... and that’s why we’re going to replace her. Thanks for all you do, If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I filed a resolution to end the war in Ukraine.
body:
Enough is enough.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GgJzXw7eH5KnOqZxC6U1GjIj3HUZ8hubw2Jp_EjfJwYG2zJTQ_osU9WdG87eNSusW7IGKf3pS16OpKlFi-HpNHie3ypgnjBuz0-VZIc-hyRuNOvDXHyJF5B-qmcYALlIrqvDXD1jNVGy8pNOLryAFwOOZmTPdW6WwGwcgdT-ExjzgZy0Ua3QPlmLu01I6cVBdFKgDKKl1DBuvUG8poAHI74bKmQ6v17O4qVPCe-1tA=&c=yv6gyK4_TZ7bWtePokEymoF413WxF4MTibT8ZeOUE0vED1CYlPKyNw==&ch=b94kr_N_Hp2e_19g3Mk3Awpf7wybdIMWWz7vh88EsPxxpXNoephcyg==)

| There comes a time when we must have the courage to say enough is enough...
Peter, I have introduced an official resolution in the House of Representatives calling for a peace agreement and AN END TO ALL U.S. MILITARY AND FINANCIAL AID FOR THE WAR IN UKRAINE!
---
| | UKRAINE WAR ENTENTE - JOIN THIS EFFORT! END THE WAR!
---
"Whereas the Biden Administration has cared more about Ukraine's border than our own; and whereas this conflict is only pushing us closer to World War III; I, Peter, will support the effort to END the War in Ukraine as a Citizen Co-Sponsor!"
[PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT HERE! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GgJzXw7eH5KnOqZxC6U1GjIj3HUZ8hubw2Jp_EjfJwYG2zJTQ_osU9WdG87eNSusW7IGKf3pS16OpKlFi-HpNHie3ypgnjBuz0-VZIc-hyRuNOvDXHyJF5B-qmcYALlIrqvDXD1jNVGy8pNOLryAFwOOZmTPdW6WwGwcgdT-ExjzgZy0Ua3QPlmLu01I6cVBdFKgDKKl1DBuvUG8poAHI74bKmQ6v17O4qVPCe-1tA=&c=yv6gyK4_TZ7bWtePokEymoF413WxF4MTibT8ZeOUE0vED1CYlPKyNw==&ch=b94kr_N_Hp2e_19g3Mk3Awpf7wybdIMWWz7vh88EsPxxpXNoephcyg==)
| I'll explain more in just a minute, Peter.
But first, I have a question for you:
Why exactly are we so focused on a country that just had to round up dozens of senior officials for "overt corruption??"
The answer just might be as simple as, shall we say, The Hunter Biden Life Motto:
"A Grifter's Gotta Grift!"
I hold a different view - that the interests of our countrymen are more important than the bottom line of defense contractors.
And if you agree Peter, then I hope you'll join me immediately. [Because the Managed Decline of America is only going to CONTINUE so long as we're sending endless blank checks to the same corrupt country where The Biden Crime Family made MILLION$! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GgJzXw7eH5KnOqZxC6U1GjIj3HUZ8hubw2Jp_EjfJwYG2zJTQ_osU9WdG87eNSusW7IGKf3pS16OpKlFi-HpNHie3ypgnjBuz0-VZIc-hyRuNOvDXHyJF5B-qmcYALlIrqvDXD1jNVGy8pNOLryAFwOOZmTPdW6WwGwcgdT-ExjzgZy0Ua3QPlmLu01I6cVBdFKgDKKl1DBuvUG8poAHI74bKmQ6v17O4qVPCe-1tA=&c=yv6gyK4_TZ7bWtePokEymoF413WxF4MTibT8ZeOUE0vED1CYlPKyNw==&ch=b94kr_N_Hp2e_19g3Mk3Awpf7wybdIMWWz7vh88EsPxxpXNoephcyg==)
Take a look:

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GgJzXw7eH5KnOqZxC6U1GjIj3HUZ8hubw2Jp_EjfJwYG2zJTQ_osU9WdG87eNSuoCy11XyKkwoWJKTle9WPA_6usmYGOOxA4F_OPnT4bcQ4pdg2ejNjc9wTx8h1UyIMXqxdAfeqjaqjIzy0zfQOpTY0wGu9HWWUoV91Who9pSNyCc8SFSl9R-SXXVTkt_2WfZKDScf1PIiN3tncjZ0tPsdS-70tA9iq4NxCbU8UaHNI7JxHMjGcuytlv0PSW-MPQ_xmqiUuA7k=&c=yv6gyK4_TZ7bWtePokEymoF413WxF4MTibT8ZeOUE0vED1CYlPKyNw==&ch=b94kr_N_Hp2e_19g3Mk3Awpf7wybdIMWWz7vh88EsPxxpXNoephcyg==)

| Someone had to speak out against this, Peter. And I'm proud to join President Trump in doing so. Because THIS is what will happen should we blindly keep propping up the Ukraine grift:

* We will deplete our own supplies and hurt our readiness
* We will fail to respond to other threats like Communist China
* We will have to keep on recklessly printing money faster than Zimbabwe
* And we will sleepwalk our way into a nuclear war with Russia - something that will END HUMANITY AS WE KNOW IT!

---
| | [DON'T LET THIS HAPPEN!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GgJzXw7eH5KnOqZxC6U1GjIj3HUZ8hubw2Jp_EjfJwYG2zJTQ_osU9WdG87eNSusW7IGKf3pS16OpKlFi-HpNHie3ypgnjBuz0-VZIc-hyRuNOvDXHyJF5B-qmcYALlIrqvDXD1jNVGy8pNOLryAFwOOZmTPdW6WwGwcgdT-ExjzgZy0Ua3QPlmLu01I6cVBdFKgDKKl1DBuvUG8poAHI74bKmQ6v17O4qVPCe-1tA=&c=yv6gyK4_TZ7bWtePokEymoF413WxF4MTibT8ZeOUE0vED1CYlPKyNw==&ch=b94kr_N_Hp2e_19g3Mk3Awpf7wybdIMWWz7vh88EsPxxpXNoephcyg==)

| For all these reasons and more, I'm putting my foot down and officially calling for an end to this war.
But Peter, the Military Industrial Complex that holds sway in the Swamp, will make me Public Enemy #1 for doing this. They will spare no expense to come after me for exposing the Ukraine grift.
And I need to know that you'll have my back now that I'm taking them head-on. Our country, our planet, and millions of lives are on the line... [Please, make sure we don't go into this fight empty-handed! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GgJzXw7eH5KnOqZxC6U1GjIj3HUZ8hubw2Jp_EjfJwYG2zJTQ_osU9WdG87eNSusW7IGKf3pS16OpKlFi-HpNHie3ypgnjBuz0-VZIc-hyRuNOvDXHyJF5B-qmcYALlIrqvDXD1jNVGy8pNOLryAFwOOZmTPdW6WwGwcgdT-ExjzgZy0Ua3QPlmLu01I6cVBdFKgDKKl1DBuvUG8poAHI74bKmQ6v17O4qVPCe-1tA=&c=yv6gyK4_TZ7bWtePokEymoF413WxF4MTibT8ZeOUE0vED1CYlPKyNw==&ch=b94kr_N_Hp2e_19g3Mk3Awpf7wybdIMWWz7vh88EsPxxpXNoephcyg==)

clean_body: Enough is enough. | | | | == | There comes a time when we must have the courage to say enough is enough... Peter, I have introduced an official resolution in the House of Representatives calling for a peace agreement and AN END TO ALL U.S. MILITARY AND FINANCIAL AID FOR THE WAR IN UKRAINE! | | UKRAINE WAR ENTENTE - JOIN THIS EFFORT! END THE WAR! "Whereas the Biden Administration has cared more about Ukraine's border than our own; and whereas this conflict is only pushing us closer to World War III; I, Peter, will support the effort to END the War in Ukraine as a Citizen Co-Sponsor!" == | I'll explain more in just a minute, Peter. But first, I have a question for you: Why exactly are we so focused on a country that just had to round up dozens of senior officials for "overt corruption??" The answer just might be as simple as, shall we say, The Hunter Biden Life Motto: "A Grifter's Gotta Grift!" I hold a different view - that the interests of our countrymen are more important than the bottom line of defense contractors. And if you agree Peter, then I hope you'll join me immediately. == Take a look: | == | Someone had to speak out against this, Peter. And I'm proud to join President Trump in doing so. Because THIS is what will happen should we blindly keep propping up the Ukraine grift: We will deplete our own supplies and hurt our readiness We will fail to respond to other threats like Communist China We will have to keep on recklessly printing money faster than Zimbabwe And we will sleepwalk our way into a nuclear war with Russia - something that will END HUMANITY AS WE KNOW IT! | | == | | == | For all these reasons and more, I'm putting my foot down and officially calling for an end to this war. But Peter, the Military Industrial Complex that holds sway in the Swamp, will make me Public Enemy #1 for doing this. They will spare no expense to come after me for exposing the Ukraine grift. And I need to know that you'll have my back now that I'm taking them head-on. Our country, our planet, and millions of lives are on the line... == Send in anything you can to support this effort for an immediate end to the war in Ukraine. | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thanks for standing with me on this, | == | Matt Gaetz (R-FL) | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | | | | | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Esther, FL 32569 | == | == Sent by mailto:campaign@mattgaetzforflorida.com

body:
They're ready to do, spend, and say whatever it takes to try and unseat Sherrod in 2024, team.
|
**BREAKING: GOP eager to take on Sherrod Brown for Ohio Senate seat** National Republicans have made it clear they're ready to do, spend, and say whatever it takes to try and unseat Sherrod in 2024, team.

Soon, we will be coming up on a $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and with election experts already calling this race a **"toss-up,"** it's crucial that we start building the resources necessary to keep Sherrod's seat blue _NOW_.

**[We're looking for 10 activists from 18326 to chip in today to help us reach our goal. Can we count on your support before the mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58679280/391863817/-1614137971?refcode=em23_230213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBlYTE5Yy1kY2FiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6L4SWdlLUWUp3Qaxxp7SYBR7U4uOK0-4iVfmcmD5FQ=)**

**Here's the bottom line, team:** Republicans know that Ohio could decide the Senate majority. With National Republicans having already named Sherrod's seat one of their top targets in 2024, it's crucial that we garner the resources to fight back against their attacks.

We already know Sherrod's multimillionaire GOP challenger, Matt Dolan, is ready to buy this election — _even if it means relying on his personal wealth to do it_. It's crucial we can compete with his spending and whatever Republicans throw our way. That's why we're building grassroots support for Sherrod now.

**[Will you be one of the 10 donors from 18326 to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can, to help Ohio Democrats reach our $15,000 mid-month fundraising deadline? name: Team NPP
subject: Democracy — it’s a Philly thing.

body:
Former Eagles cornerback Bobby Taylor weighs in on expanding the electorate.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58679299/391863924/-1026687944?ms=EM_FR_230213Eagles_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YTg2YWMxLWRjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pkCw5VnlD08TI5_9yCSHA0V5wzH2Ab9P6JRTJ5LDBlw=&emci=3ba86ac1-dcab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=45a86ac1-dcab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1522179)
| Fellow activist, the Eagles may not have won this year, but our democracy still can. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58679300/391863925/-1026687944?ms=EM_FR_230213Eagles_N_TEAM_90DO_4_G_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YTg2YWMxLWRjYWItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pkCw5VnlD08TI5_9yCSHA0V5wzH2Ab9P6JRTJ5LDBlw=&emci=3ba86ac1-dcab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=45a86ac1-dcab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1522179) Former Philadelphia Eagles cornerback #21 Bobby Taylor reminds us:

“Our democracy is being threatened, and voting rights are at stake. We need to take action and increase the number of registered voters in Pennsylvania. Not everyone who is eligible to vote is registered. Not everyone who is registered votes. And not everyone votes in every single election twice a year.”

After registering 20,000 voters in 2022, centering historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work, the New Pennsylvania Project is **_expanding our efforts to include Philadelphia in 2023._**

clean_body: Former Eagles cornerback Bobby Taylor weighs in on expanding the electorate. | Fellow activist, the Eagles may not have won this year, but our democracy still can. Former Philadelphia Eagles cornerback #21 Bobby Taylor reminds us: “Our democracy is being threatened, and voting rights are at stake. We need to take action and increase the number of registered voters in Pennsylvania. Not everyone who is eligible to vote is registered. Not everyone who is registered votes. And not everyone votes in every single election twice a year.” After registering 20,000 voters in 2022, centering historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work, the New Pennsylvania Project is expanding our efforts to include Philadelphia in 2023. On the road to victory, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. body:
there’s only one way to fight back:

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Secret Service Official: ‘Maybe We Were Asked for A Favor?’ in Investigation of Hunter Biden’s Gun
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 487 pages of records from the United States Secret Service (USSS) related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware in October 2018

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 13, 2023
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62197&L=28878&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy1ndW4vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6bdc199275e3fa4f8daac65a6635fe335201f218016e22479887a7d853fcc3f1) | **[Judicial Watch: Secret Service Official: ‘Maybe We Were Asked for A Favor?’ in Investigation of Hunter Biden’s Gun](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62197&L=28878&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtaHVudGVyLWJpZGVucy1ndW4vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6bdc199275e3fa4f8daac65a6635fe335201f218016e22479887a7d853fcc3f1)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 487 pages of records from the United States Secret Service (USSS) related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware in October 2018. The records show agency officials discussing media reports of its alleged involvement with one finding it “odd” that the Secret Service was involved in the investigation when Joe and Hunter Biden were not receiving Secret Service protection at the time. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 487 pages of records from the United States Secret Service (USSS) related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware in October 2018 | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 13, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 487 pages of records from the United States Secret Service (USSS) related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware in October 2018. The records show agency officials discussing media reports of its alleged involvement with one finding it “odd” that the Secret Service was involved in the investigation when Joe and Hunter Biden were not receiving Secret Service protection at the time. Another official responds: “Maybe we were asked for a favor?” ---|--- | | | | | “It again took a lawsuit for the Biden administration to hand over, albeit heavily redacted, information regarding the safety of the COVID vaccines that the public has every right to know,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “This disturbing batch of new documents have uncovered a secret confidentiality agreement tied to COVID vaccine safety issues and emails that raise new questions about the vaccines and pregnancy.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit after the Department of Defense failed to comply with an October 31, 2022, FOIA request for all communications within the Office of the Secretary of Defense, Secretary of the Navy, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, and Commandant of Marine Corps – and those shared with the White House Military Office and Office of the President – regarding Marines standing behind the President during his September 1, 2022, speech in Philadelphia. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration’s costly, governmentwide effort to advance racial equity and support the nation’s underserved population through taxpayer-funded programs is going global. The administration recently disclosed that it is dedicating a million dollars to “empower marginalized racial and ethnic communities in Europe,” though details of how this will be accomplished remain ambiguous. What is clear is that the soon-to-be empowered minority Europeans are to include people of African descent and Roma people, according to the recently published grant announcement. ---|--- | | | The Daily Mail The Secret Service has been accused of a ‘cover-up’ over its alleged involvement in a police investigation when Hunter Biden‘s lover dumped his gun in a trash can near a school in 2018. Judicial Watch, a justice watchdog nonprofit, announced on Friday that it received 487 pages of Secret Service (USSS) records over the incident, and says the documents cast further doubt over the agency’s claims that it was not involved. CNS News Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Defense Department because it has failed to produce legally requested communications concerning President Joe Biden’s Sept. 1 campaign speech in Philadelphia, where he positioned two U.S. Marines to stand behind him as he lectured that “MAGA Republicans” are threatening the “very foundations of our Republic.” CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to obtain any communications made between the Surgeon General’s communications director and social media companies — Twitter, Facebook, etc. — regarding COVID-19 vaccines. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

I've been told by my Republican friends in the U.S. Senate to specifically reach out to you to get your opinion on the most important issues facing th

Fellow American, it's Kellyanne Conway – former Senior Counselor to President Trump.

I know you're extremely busy, so I won't be long. I've been told by my Republican friends in the U.S. Senate to specifically reach out to you to get your opinion on the most important issues facing the American people today.

body:
|
---

| | Hi team, I wanted to take a moment to formally introduce myself! I’m Alex Polley and I have the privilege of being Susie Lee’s new Finance Director. I’m going to share a little bit about who I am and my background, but I wouldn’t be doing my job if I didn’t ask you to [**please chip in to support Susie Lee in what will be one of the most competitive House races in the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58681048/391870524/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230213_FR_ALEXINTRO_A1_SEND_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmViMGJlNy1lMmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPA3Dqlw5Di8ugrMisX6VIwYJeMwLP9iYStd1ZjUrmQ=) | | | [Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58681049/391870525/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230213_FR_ALEXINTRO_A1_SEND_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmViMGJlNy1lMmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPA3Dqlw5Di8ugrMisX6VIwYJeMwLP9iYStd1ZjUrmQ=)
---
I first joined Susie’s campaign back in 2021 as Deputy Finance Director. It was an awesome experience, and I knew I was ready to do more to help keep Nevada’s most competitive House district blue.
Now, as Finance Director, I have the big responsibility of making sure we raise what we need to win in 2024. Whether it’s yearly, quarterly, or monthly – we cannot miss a single fundraising benchmark in a race as close as Susie’s.
The Republican Party is willing to spend however much is necessary to flip this seat – _on top of the tens of millions they’ve spent attacking Susie Lee in her previous races._
But I’ve been on this campaign long enough to know that we have the people-power to re-elect Susie and fight back.
Now that you know a little more about me, I hope you’ll take my word when I say that we need your support. [**Can you chip in $25 or $10 to help our campaign re-elect Susie Lee in 2024 and keep her highly-competitive seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58681050/391870526/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230213_FR_ALEXINTRO_A1_SEND_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmViMGJlNy1lMmFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPA3Dqlw5Di8ugrMisX6VIwYJeMwLP9iYStd1ZjUrmQ=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Where Republicans hold power, they’re passing dangerous abortion bans that put millions of lives at risk, anti-LGBTQ+ bills that persecute the already vulnerable, and anti-democracy voter suppression bills that disenfranchise entire communities – we can’t let their extremism go unanswered.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: We win by getting in at the ground level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Will you help us maintain the resources for early field organizing work this cycle?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58681450/391872143/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230213MM_MM_JW_FULL_14_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWM5MmQ4Yy1lNWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4-g6KRqoy2VSHQw7aRsdc_IchgIJRM3AfUpx6qYflc=)
---
Hi there — I wanted to make sure you saw yesterday's message about our February Field Organizing Fund.

If I've learned one thing from the past 9 years of campaigns I've been involved in, it's that races are won at the ground level — meeting face-to-face wherever possible with the voters who will decide the election.

To have the resources for a strong (and early) field operation, we have to move at a steady clip in 2023. That takes resources, and meeting our goal this week is a critical step in keeping us at the pace we need.

[**So will you pitch in by Wednesday night? We still need $2,756 more to reach our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58681451/391872144/-1786109964?refcode=EM_FR_230213MM_MM_JW_FULL_14_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWM5MmQ4Yy1lNWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4-g6KRqoy2VSHQw7aRsdc_IchgIJRM3AfUpx6qYflc=)

Thank you,

Jennifer

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> | **February Field Organizing Fund**
>
> Goal: $5,000 [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58681452/391872145/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230213MM_MM_JW_FULL_14_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWM5MmQ4Yy1lNWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4-g6KRqoy2VSHQw7aRsdc_IchgIJRM3AfUpx6qYflc=)
> ---
> Friend, the 2022 election was Jennifer's closest race yet. She won by less than 7 percent in a district that, just a year before, Glenn Youngkin came 2 percent short of carrying.
>
> **The data is clear: VA-10 is a prime battleground district. And we're making sure to get a head start this cycle by ramping up our operations as fast as possible.**
>
> We're launching a February Field Organizing Fund to fuel our early volunteer recruitment and voter contact efforts around the district — because it's never too early to engage folks.
>
> [**Can you chip in to help us meet our goal of $5,000 by Wednesday? clean_body: Will you help us maintain the resources for early field organizing work this cycle? = Hi there — I wanted to make sure you saw yesterday's message about our February Field Organizing Fund. If I've learned one thing from the past 9 years of campaigns I've been involved in, it's that races are won at the ground level — meeting face-to-face wherever possible with the voters who will decide the election. To have the resources for a strong (and early) field operation, we have to move at a steady clip in 2023. That takes resources, and meeting our goal this week is a critical step in keeping us at the pace we need. = Thank you, Jennifer — Begin Forwarded Message — | February Field Organizing Fund Goal: $5,000 = --- Friend, the 2022 election was Jennifer's closest race yet. She won by less than 7 percent in a district that, just a year before, Glenn Youngkin came 2 percent short of carrying. The data is clear: VA-10 is a prime battleground district. And we're making sure to get a head start this cycle by ramping up our operations as fast as possible. We're launching a February Field Organizing Fund to fuel our early volunteer recruitment and voter contact efforts around the district — because it's never too early to engage folks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- We expect Jennifer's seat to once again be on the NRCC's radar, and we can't let the Republicans outpace us. To win in a busy and expensive cycle, we need to tell Jennifer's story across all of VA-10. But if the GOP gets their way, they'll define us first and tell their version — a false version — of Jennifer's story. The truth is that Jennifer's record of supporting legislation that created jobs, lowered the cost of living for families, and jumpstarted renewable energy projects is one that appeals to voters. Now, we have to build the kind of organization that can share that record over the noise, attacks, and misinformation we're sure to see from Republicans. = Thanks! Team Wexton Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
