name: Team AOC
subject: These emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Google just changed the rules (again).
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230213-3884-header&t=1&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)
Last week, we got some tough news for our email program.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230210.eiRiH3&refcode=em20230213-3884-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)
Since Google ended its program that helped emails from our campaign get delivered to your primary inbox, we’ve had to dramatically scale back the number of people we can contact.
This makes it harder for us to communicate breaking news, legislative updates, organizing opportunities, and fundraising alerts to all of you — so we must take matters into our own hands. That’s why we’re asking for your help.
This problem is not unique to Google, and it’s not new. Companies like Apple, Microsoft, and Yahoo have been driving a larger trend over the last few years that’s made it harder and harder to make sure emails like this are reaching supporters like you.
To be clear: We fully support giving people full control over their inbox, privacy, and data. **Trust us, if you don’t want to****receive our emails, we don’t want to send them to you.**
But if you do want to make sure that you see our emails and help us have as strong a sender reputation as possible, here are a few steps you can take:
1. **Make sure our emails stay where you can see them:** Please take a few steps including clicking on any link in this email ([**here’s one you can use**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230210.eiRiH3&refcode=em20230213-3884-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)), marking this email as important, replying to the email, and if you use Gmail, making sure our emails are set to go to your Primary folder.

2. **Help us get back on track:** We’ve had to put a halt on many of our email plans over the last week, including the fundraising emails we rely on to fund our campaign, pay our staff, and run community programs. [**If you can pitch in $5 or $15, it would go a long way to help us get back on track now that Alexandria has officially filed for re-election.

**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230210.eiRiH3&refcode=em20230213-3884-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)
3. **Share your thoughts:** What kind of emails are most interesting and helpful to you? Do you have other ideas on how we can improve? No idea is too big or small – [**please share your suggestions or thoughts here!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/tell-us-your-email-ideas/?source=em20230213-3884-P&t=5&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)

Thank you for reading and for all your support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230210?refcode=em20230213-3884-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=6&refcode2=3884_2526796_M3jxZT&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230213-3884-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=7&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3884%2E2526796%2EM3jxZT)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c8c815046054943b48889a5a1d7e0e5&_e=RaYpx36FPt0P2dDqmAidZZgnf41h0vJ6Jp4E2bOJiB4kt5J4abXhBeACf79NLvu1AAkktLIbDkAV0CEJZlJcPo5lM0RvPqBXb15Aixih1Gevn_ZTcvYhzeDc3-P_Ict_gWyLuEqhn_MwupzDWMcj2oCDqgdyuMgA5uHxMJ53so2PPARIdS9dJpaRElu_9o7xmJ1UNr8MncJw2QOdOkMdZo_ZZymDENb3gWFxn6FczIs7kw3v0IiR4q5TjOQqj9bFT9t2vQRsgSemeoLDZrbzXKMQ7Msfc5hIyCObRjqf24OoMp0ZXnZq511n8OZmbfCysiXdNDYAnu7PUSXuVdEyqFdYDKAsENDq80YQuh37Ofq7uyyI0Zr1Fc4d8hasRKh9I3oYnJTtHLB9mYz1Le13uGWKVPgzgB17Sa4LFxOFydoVkfiySzKU89nNVBq7vzBi)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c8c815046054943b48889a5a1d7e0e5&_e=RaYpx36FPt0P2dDqmAidZZgnf41h0vJ6Jp4E2bOJiB4kt5J4abXhBeACf79NLvu1AAkktLIbDkAV0CEJZlJcPo5lM0RvPqBXb15Aixih1Gevn_ZTcvYhzeDc3-P_Ict_gWyLuEqhn_MwupzDWMcj2oCDqgdyuMgA5uHxMJ53so2PPARIdS9dJpaRElu_9o7xmJ1UNr8MncJw2QOdOkMdZo_ZZymDENb3gWFxn6FczIs7kw3v0IiR4q5TjOQqj9bFT9t2vQRsgSemeoLDZrbzXMCPAzINCbrejvIKUbjj5DWQB0IDpw5dOsU6gpJD4bHrMlHIXY9mFzYU2LVqAseXitWDWcJ5k5nAWVmFoh8QV4oL9-kApdNH22k-igVqlSjXxM8yygw76igBEokXpocrcR9R0LqctqQUUf0Fr0eRAxIwhLrQYULfez-QoKRg0REY)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c8c815046054943b48889a5a1d7e0e5&_e=RaYpx36FPt0P2dDqmAidZZgnf41h0vJ6Jp4E2bOJiB4kt5J4abXhBeACf79NLvu1AAkktLIbDkAV0CEJZlJcPo5lM0RvPqBXb15Aixih1Gevn_ZTcvYhzeDc3-P_Ict_gWyLuEqhn_MwupzDWMcj2oCDqgdyuMgA5uHxMJ53so2PPARIdS9dJpaRElu_9o7xmJ1UNr8MncJw2QOdOkMdZo_ZZymDENb3gWFxn6FczIs7kw3v0IiR4q5TjOQqj9bFT9t2vQRsgSemeoLDZrbzXEwqWxombmgxAJRUFs6AfmfTKPQWIMOLmCrkXzFG0QAEpq2NkIaaX8Osr6BQATPMgjlHjn8mHJSdgJK1fMbKuUqJHZ3wbjCBlFINI7JnqDdylS-J23sXcTiYgpZLvxJOMhux-ybZVaA0ybtxGTkJT1S2GdZBlZaDURt0sz6u1pws)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c8c815046054943b48889a5a1d7e0e5&_e=RaYpx36FPt0P2dDqmAidZZgnf41h0vJ6Jp4E2bOJiB4kt5J4abXhBeACf79NLvu1AAkktLIbDkAV0CEJZlJcPo5lM0RvPqBXb15Aixih1Gevn_ZTcvYhzeDc3-P_Ict_gWyLuEqhn_MwupzDWMcj2oCDqgdyuMgA5uHxMJ53so2PPARIdS9dJpaRElu_9o7xmJ1UNr8MncJw2QOdOkMdZo_ZZymDENb3gWFxn6FczIs7kw3v0IiR4q5TjOQqj9bFT9t2vQRsgSemeoLDZrbzXJPGqt7i1LoqCKM2ViCqMRL0kXapdPrJIMz8EHTFg1gW7u9XvJDzqeKVkyDTIs5ogPbb95C5RtCdwNTdEgLfROz9TJmwwawv4UnTQB01CzC0XzulDN3IrHhvpu0-5JkkSQvLD01nAgr4tB4DiMb1YJJGHtgsYHIVdT5t1zJGi7Wt).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
|

Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Will you be one of the 200 supporters we need before tomorrow?
#
Peter,
With February being the shortest month of the year, we don't have a lot of time left to reach our end of month projections — and my team has told me that we're $6k behind our mid-month fundraising goal.
In staying true to upholding the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, **_I have never accepted a dime in corporate money.**_ Our movement's work is wholly fueled by the generosity of our grassroots supporters. [**So today I'm asking: can you be one of the 200 supporters we need to fuel our people-powered movement before tomorrow?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35407?refcode=em20230213-2166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)**
**[Pitch in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35407?refcode=em20230213-2166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)**
Our movement is invested in improving the lives of working class people across the country. We know what is possible when we're able to effectively organize and mobilize around the issues that impact our communities the most. Every donation is **_key**_ in our efforts to build a new political consensus that is working toward the bold solutions we need to solve these issues.
Our movement has come a long way, and we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the **_narrow**_ Republican majority in the House.
[**And that's why we're asking: can you chip in to our progressive movement today to keep us fighting for progress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35407?refcode=em20230213-2166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35407?refcode=em20230213-2166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230213-2166-footer&t=23&refcode2=2166_420207_MIj5Nc&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2166%2E420207%2EMIj5Nc)

His record of leadership is comprised of tangible conservative results for our constituents.

That illustrates the overwhelming strength of his deep support among local Republicans; a prerequisite needed to take the fight to an entrenched Democratic incumbent like Sherrod Brown in every county across the state. In the face of Democratic attacks, Republicans must stand united to advance forward-looking results for our cities and conservative reform for America. Matt is taking the fight right to Sherrod Brown. We must maintain his focus by supporting a leader who gets things done.

name: Josh (personal)
subject: the gateway tunnel project
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Friends,

I wanted to share an exciting update on a very important project I’ve been working on. President Biden recently announced a $292 million federal investment into the Gateway Tunnel project.

Gateway has been a long time coming, and after years of hard work, this is a huge win for Jersey to finally begin work on the Hudson River Tunnel project – a key step to completing the Gateway Train Tunnel.

So many Jerseyites rely heavily on the rail for their daily commutes – whether it be to work, school, or a sporting event. However, the current tunnel connecting New Jersey and New York is more than 110 years old and is plagued with delays and the wear of an aging piece of infrastructure.

For years, New Jersey families have watched the 110+ years-old tunnel start to crumble, and today. I am proud to say that we can finally put shovels in the ground and get to work on the Hudson River Tunnel Project. This project will not only enhance New Jersey's infrastructure but will boost the economy, strengthen supply chains, and reduce commutes.

Can I count on you to contribute $ to ensure I can continue my fight for NJ-5 for the next two years, and beyond? Your donation of just $ helps ensure NJ-5 and my mission for bipartisan progress is protected [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jgf-fr-2302]

Thank you for all you do,

Josh Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44e400be45ac44fa81594731ad319203&_e=ssOw5wgoRkDPZwh7RzTvRLyRxhTTV-pwMMNdImSwpWGgiVniSIhyc06wvKLatxf1u7zu_zqnRwQ4p2dK21XkWIvZorFWH5Dn6v-vBCtr4vIsG69oKFxpLeHl3s0cukEGhwdO-zoge9J-0noFslaV4KJmymrpVxIyf1fl7GYaZjtJlJ2Cz0qXQ7o7ZOwWQL-GXgWv1TRVnphfhQ7Ls7KsySNJWcZ6d5L1jFjnBYTyXoirCdUKDo3QlSk-V_bbopOInX-Zlewu2xqI7jaOxbTCF12mng1o3Df4O_K-TVeXaM4%3D)
Friend,

It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.

It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did:

_“You're going to relegate my history to a month?**Black history is American history.** ”_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history — _and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today_ — I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44e400be45ac44fa81594731ad319203&_e=ssOw5wgoRkDPZwh7RzTvRLyRxhTTV-pwMMNdImSwpWGgiVniSIhyc06wvKLatxf1u7zu_zqnRwQ4p2dK21XkWIvZorFWH5Dn6v-vBCtr4vIsG69oKFxpLeHl3s0cukEGhwdO-zoge9J-0noFslaV4HBQMfVR-zDWUIKxbIVSSaexy_SWr4sBo5B2UU-3aFrtEqFm9HSDorXtEF0BVhV1C62ZnpGmWY-txY-Oq6bT9GXUzjdp9s07O_WHv7WpnbD5uyDp1hy07U3ic5Fxhrt2TC_8Vf77sguWBXulPBAk29k%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44e400be45ac44fa81594731ad319203&_e=ssOw5wgoRkDPZwh7RzTvRLyRxhTTV-pwMMNdImSwpWGgiVniSIhyc06wvKLatxf1u7zu_zqnRwQ4p2dK21XkWIvZorFWH5Dn6v-vBCtr4vIsG69oKFxpLeHl3s0cukEGhwdO-zoge9J-0noFslaV4CAfhwqeXEfSzEPTlLke9UQbcrGWRSPHzmhDiJsggSatGnLlKZAzLicgj9iQOb9md8v9wVswTMHqeru2EHQkxkoZMoO0Z8YLr1Bf8q9F5ogJJ6Ixt0jenuLDgRtUb98armUyAaYJBmrY3azCc5D0MfM%3D)

Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44e400be45ac44fa81594731ad319203&_e=ssOw5wgoRkDPZwh7RzTvRLyRxhTTV-pwMMNdImSwpWGgiVniSIhyc06wvKLatxf1u7zu_zqnRwQ4p2dK21XkWIvZorFWH5Dn6v-vBCtr4vIsG69oKFxpLeHl3s0cukEGJohxAIFo8hzzX1KNetdi31nzKlDbgC7vlVDgg_z-6jwGGi2morPvzH1k1Hu8djHqGMcV8Cgb5_8fBt0JpI96xSta5vfpnR0_r-5D0xQyZh-GaAcoFdYG0IF4NNbRYpAZXWKmMW2WTcasa-Xhdz9rgMAGdvV0qlj8cb500wMHL2A%3D)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Sign on: Pete Buttigieg must listen to rail workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, you’ve
probably heard the terrible news from Ohio:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/rail-safety/?source=em20230213-27528&t=1001&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9 ]More Perfect Union: On February 3, a horrifying railroad accident took
place. A Norfolk Southern freight train derailed in East Palestine, Ohio.
You might've seen images of the flames, but you probably haven't heard
that unions were trying to prevent this exact accident.

But this terrible accident is made worse because it was entirely
avoidable. Rail workers tried to warn us that this derailment could take
place. Take a look at this headline:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/rail-safety/?source=em20230213-27528&t=1002&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9 ]The New Republic: Rail Workers Tried to Warn Us the Ohio Train
Derailment Would Happen

The Secretary of Transportation, Pete Buttigieg, has so far continued
Trump-era deregulation by not requiring companies to upgrade their brake
systems on trains. We need your help to push Pete Buttigieg, to take
action, regulate the rail industry, and ensure these rail companies
upgrade their brake systems.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/rail-safety/?source=em20230213-27528&t=1003&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9 ]Will you add your name right now to call on Pete Buttigieg to listen to
the workers and enforce these safety regulations to prevent any more
disasters?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/rail-safety/?source=em20230213-27528&t=1004&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9 ]Add Your Name

Thank you for being a part of our movement. Whether you can contribute a
grassroot contribution or take action when we need it today to support
rail workers, we’re so grateful to have you with us in the fight for
progress.

More soon,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230213-27528-footer&t=1007&refcode2=27528_1203867_0PF2c9&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=27528%2E1203867%2E0PF2c9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Bernie is demanding Howard Schultz testify, and in response, Schultz is going to attack Bernie ferociously. That’s why we need your help. [ ]Rush a donation now to stand with Bernie against union busting billionaires, and read our message below for more details on the fight ahead! ----Begin Forwarded Message---- [ ][IMG] [ ]STAND WITH BERNIE Peter Willis, As workers unionize to demand fair pay and better conditions, Starbucks has fought back ferociously with illegal union busting tactics, including withholding an increase of $200 million in salary and benefits that nonunion stores received from hundreds of unionizing stores across America. If that’s not bad enough, they’ve also closed unionized stores and hired union busters who previously worked for the infamous Pinkerton Detective Agency. That’s why our founder, Bernie Sanders, is demanding that Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz testify before his committee. [ ]Howard Schultz is a billionaire and is already attacking Bernie with the full power of his resources. Can we count on you to chip in to stand with workers and help Bernie and Our Revolution hold Starbucks accountable? clean_body: The road to regaining the House majority runs through PA-07. | = | Peter, At last week’s State of the Union address, President Biden discussed the great amount of progress Democrats have made in delivering results for the American people. I’m proud to be an advocate for my district in Congress, but I know we have a tough fight ahead of us in 2024. = | = Republicans have proven to us that they can’t be trusted to lead. They’re already attacking reproductive rights, Social Security, and Medicare, and there’s no telling what they’ll come after next. If we want to keep up our momentum and progress, we must have a Democratic majority in the House. The road to regaining the House majority runs through PA-07, so early investments are key to building a strong foundation for the coming election cycle. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. They said democracy is on the line

| | Hi Peter, it’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and I’m writing to you about the most important election you may not have heard about.

Last week, Pod Save America covered the stakes of this election. _Here’s what they said:_

Wisconsin has a once-in-a-decade opportunity to rebalance the Wisconsin State Supreme Court and buck Republican authoritarianism in Wisconsin once and for all.

But there’s also a very real chance we get shut out of this April election if a progressive doesn’t make the cut in our fast-approaching primary on February 21.

We stay neutral in the primary, Peter. But we can’t sit back and let MAGA candidates Jennifer Dorow and Dan Kelly capture all the votes this month.

We only have one week left to mobilize voters ahead of our primary. To do it, I need to make sure my team has the resources they need to beat Dorow and Kelly this month.

[_**So I’m personally asking you, Peter: Can you rush in any amount to support my team at the WisDems and the Democratic Party of Georgia before our primary on February 21? **Friend: After serving in Democratic leadership in the House for two decades, including as the first woman speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi has stepped down from leadership. **

Despite relentless attacks and lies from extremist Republicans, including Donald Trump, Nancy Pelosi has remained committed to making life better for _every_ American – from spearheading passage of the historic Affordable Care Act in the House to fighting for women's rights.
**Nancy Pelosi has worked tirelessly to hold Republicans accountable. We're grateful for her leadership, which is why **[**we've set a goal to gather 10,000 signatures for her thank-you card, but we're still 752 short. clean_body: They know they can walk all over him. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, | Our enemies can smell weakness in the White House from across the globe. | It all began with Biden’s disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan – where he abandoned U.S. civilians and left behind $85 billion worth of weapons for terrorists to take. | Biden then sent mixed messages on defending Taiwan from China. | Our enemies saw that America was without a leader and decided to test the limits of Biden’s weakness... | ...The Taliban captured Afghanistan. Putin invaded and annexed parts of Ukraine. China flew bombers over Taiwan. | But then, our enemies wanted to see if they could even invade our airspace and get away with it. | So, in one of the most humiliating moments in American history, the Chinese Communist Party felt emboldened enough to SPY on American citizens and sensitive military infrastructure for AN ENTIRE WEEK. | Our enemies are SALIVATING at the sight of Biden and Kamala in the White House. | America has a “Commander” in Chief who is too incompetent and too compromised to stand up for our nation – and the whole world knows it. | But now, I want the American people to speak up and rate their current “Commander” In Chief. | POLL: Do you feel safe with Biden as our “Commander” in Chief? | | No one dared mess with America when I was your President. | | | But now, China, Iran, and Russia only need to look at the INVASION that is allowed to happen every single day on our Southern border and laugh at us. | Our enemies look at Biden and see a spineless man they can walk all over like a doormat. | We desperately need STRONG, DECISIVE LEADERSHIP back in the White House. | But I want to be able to point to a poll that shows just how many Americans believe that our nation is weaker with Biden in the White House. | "So please, take my “State of the Union Response Survey” to help craft my response to Biden’s speech tomorrow night." | Thank you, | | | Donald J. Hey Peter, I wanted to touch base about our fundraising progress so far this year. Our first FEC deadline is at the end of March, and we’re about halfway through the quarter as of this week. Our first public fundraising report is a really important one — it’s going to be viewed as a barometer for the success and viability of Tammy’s campaign for re-election next year. **And truthfully? I’m a bit worried about our numbers right now.** We’re almost halfway through February, and we’re falling behind where we need to be. **THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Hey Peter,

It's Amy Kate Budd here, and I wanted to tell you about my husband, Senator Ted Budd. **[You can watch our story,"Motorcycles and Ministry," here:](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=86542d08ca954f8c9fdef08dfcde70f4&_e=pY6AAVhEokdthlqPjCKbr_jHYirHSFrAEtM31-wEmraabgE0DQvK5M-PIG_Nw08C9o7KBuJ1ddXZwqdReh8GBemr2F94w5ivkfBTsmDTR27POa_BbVghV1YyL1cbr8Qg6aYPZWbkUMiCfoAog12JR3CKO-dmbL65oJcN-5yFlwFwiaYbDJZBiJJbEfBB72blEw8fr_2lFqBiK7Omxatz0Dr5jR559BhFLpkasPszTFA5wjh2bFZ-bQHYfuEOajuXSJWA0KQGCZZM5EoqRcI0wAMuuA3PmmWDRq2345p0GQ8nLdsVgbFYuF8UVThg87o5mX_3Ve1lmpgnY-glYaimcto_AjV8W_NjA2SnbTIvOCdBEjI_F2Lc9ai27k8LnPci8E9zkRHiYvcCkJ37L3RfZZtDyU9L-GunEP_kpC8E-AvaWlSF21ipbz9zBk3Lbv1Shcoqm27GBnbL027uual-ber6DJsaU3uZzwkNA_qdHqLi8OTNhjCprYMVK8s95vaUT8-utP3ct94g2RMLeeL0Fg%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=86542d08ca954f8c9fdef08dfcde70f4&_e=pY6AAVhEokdthlqPjCKbr_jHYirHSFrAEtM31-wEmraabgE0DQvK5M-PIG_Nw08C9o7KBuJ1ddXZwqdReh8GBemr2F94w5ivkfBTsmDTR27POa_BbVghV1YyL1cbr8Qg6aYPZWbkUMiCfoAog12JR3CKO-dmbL65oJcN-5yFlwFwiaYbDJZBiJJbEfBB72blEw8fr_2lFqBiK7Omxatz0Dr5jR559BhFLpkasPszTFA5wjh2bFZ-bQHYfuEOajuXSJWA0KQGCZZM5EoqRcI0wAMuuA3PmmWDRq2345p0GQ8nLdsVgbFYuF8UVThg87o5mX_3Ve1lmpgnY-glYaimcto_AjV8W_NjA2SnbTIvOCdBEjI_F2Lc9ai27k8LnPci2CiFF3_3EtE1Lbiz170tz6yAJ6yzkVZAdvKF78oxcuPrRp17ywGdCBBnmYcPbuUNBXL9W763445SYzcSccmguXpCTQKeyb2GlIIoJcEoVtYa0Fe00_stLfD3FWGqGJo09q76O4qIoLKJufH6GM0mIg%3D%3D)

Ted and I met on an American mission trip to then-Communist USSR. We were both in college and signed up to go on this trip because our faith is so important to us.

We became friends, and one day, on spring break in Daytona, Ted confidently knocked on my door and asked me to ride motorcycles on the beach with him. Of course, I immediately said yes!

[](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=86542d08ca954f8c9fdef08dfcde70f4&_e=pY6AAVhEokdthlqPjCKbr_jHYirHSFrAEtM31-wEmraabgE0DQvK5M-PIG_Nw08C9o7KBuJ1ddXZwqdReh8GBemr2F94w5ivkfBTsmDTR27POa_BbVghV1YyL1cbr8Qg6aYPZWbkUMiCfoAog12JR3CKO-dmbL65oJcN-5yFlwFwiaYbDJZBiJJbEfBB72blEw8fr_2lFqBiK7Omxatz0Dr5jR559BhFLpkasPszTFA5wjh2bFZ-bQHYfuEOajuXSJWA0KQGCZZM5EoqRcI0wAMuuA3PmmWDRq2345p0GQ8nLdsVgbFYuF8UVThg87o5mX_3Ve1lmpgnY-glYaimcto_AjV8W_NjA2SnbTIvOCdBEjI_F2Lc9ai27k8LnPciKGdybCaxtflYQ2Fp7GA1zQwnHBIo71JVK6oXdi6GefQ3Z8zEqSYDgSWXQF4oSSkmZzSIJ7P7pySy2L1pb9S0ClarCjTcwts5rZWy7p8C9JZlazMgg1cQ8fl7u7V_U7CgkpphXIhbQffsh2u6xlP_NQ%3D%3D)

Ted swept me off my feet, and we've been together ever since. Ted is the hardest-working man I know, and he will always fight for North Carolina and fight for America. **[Ted is a conservative fighter, a small business owner, and a family man.](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=86542d08ca954f8c9fdef08dfcde70f4&_e=pY6AAVhEokdthlqPjCKbr_jHYirHSFrAEtM31-wEmraabgE0DQvK5M-PIG_Nw08C9o7KBuJ1ddXZwqdReh8GBemr2F94w5ivkfBTsmDTR27POa_BbVghV1YyL1cbr8Qg6aYPZWbkUMiCfoAog12JR3CKO-dmbL65oJcN-5yFlwFwiaYbDJZBiJJbEfBB72blEw8fr_2lFqBiK7Omxatz0Dr5jR559BhFLpkasPszTFA5wjh2bFZ-bQHYfuEOajuXSJWA0KQGCZZM5EoqRcI0wAMuuA3PmmWDRq2345p0GQ8nLdsVgbFYuF8UVThg87o5mX_3Ve1lmpgnY-glYaimcto_AjV8W_NjA2SnbTIvOCdBEjI_F2Lc9ai27k8LnPcixjGJBQczHcWJOkTD-G_qrsKhJeCm6PtWiAvHbEsxKkhfuHvH6rotqUvibkQmdh-nTPQri7rxLoHtIt0XndokIkuE3wZu9VtExc1zVsUluM5lhKlUBq1kN_EX5o8ReaMrZdOra-OEejBh9SLE4fvTqQ%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=86542d08ca954f8c9fdef08dfcde70f4&_e=pY6AAVhEokdthlqPjCKbr_jHYirHSFrAEtM31-wEmraabgE0DQvK5M-PIG_Nw08C9o7KBuJ1ddXZwqdReh8GBemr2F94w5ivkfBTsmDTR27POa_BbVghV1YyL1cbr8Qg6aYPZWbkUMiCfoAog12JR3CKO-dmbL65oJcN-5yFlwFwiaYbDJZBiJJbEfBB72blEw8fr_2lFqBiK7Omxatz0Dr5jR559BhFLpkasPszTFA5wjh2bFZ-bQHYfuEOajuXSJWA0KQGCZZM5EoqRcI0wAMuuA3PmmWDRq2345p0GQ8nLdsVgbFYuF8UVThg87o5mX_3Ve1lmpgnY-glYaimcto_AjV8W_NjA2SnbTIvOCdBEjI_F2Lc9ai27k8LnPciL5SyOTbHOvKyFvGh_za5Xb-bgPYfOa6AGcHsvh5JekVBAWS5HQLHqqmv1NANMMYEfSsLbcB_Kc2E8v3qL-BhPv-0L0t6z2xr4zzj3lcEFvVolb4017-PvIvXQBJtMqmlX5YkzOn6GDHGDcRFw5Jfww%3D%3D)

Today, Ted faithfully serves the good people of North Carolina as U.S. Senator. Ted is working day in and day out to fight for everyday families, not the elite or political insiders. He's fighting to restore the conservative, constitutional values that make this country great.

clean_body: | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey Peter, It's Amy Kate Budd here, and I wanted to tell you about my husband, Senator Ted Budd. Ted and I met on an American mission trip to then-Communist USSR. We were both in college and signed up to go on this trip because our faith is so important to us. We became friends, and one day, on spring break in Daytona, Ted confidently knocked on my door and asked me to ride motorcycles on the beach with him. Of course, I immediately said yes! Ted swept me off my feet, and we've been together ever since. Ted is the hardest-working man I know, and he will always fight for North Carolina and fight for America. Today, Ted faithfully serves the good people of North Carolina as U.S. Senator. Ted is working day in and day out to fight for everyday families, not the elite or political insiders. He's fighting to restore the conservative, constitutional values that make this country great. | Thank you, and God Bless, Amy Kate Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

## Senate expands contraceptive access, passes housing protections, plans to hear SB 233
This week, I was proud to vote for bills that expand access to long-acting reversible contraception (IUDs) and that protect renters from negligent landlords. Common sense bills like these go a long way for Hoosier families, who deserve safety, protection, and the ability to live and plan their lives freely. I'm also excited to say that my bill, SB 233—which creates a task force to study road and infrastructure safety—is scheduled for a hearing tomorrow. I will continue to support bills that offer Hoosiers more freedom and more security.
[Read More](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyMzAyMTMuNzE0OTQ3NjEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2luZGlhbmFjYXBpdGFsY2hyb25pY2xlLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAyLzA4L2hvdXNpbmctZWR1Y2F0aW9uLWJpbGxzLWFtb25nLWtleS1tZWFzdXJlcy1wYXNzZWQtdHVlc2RheS8ifQ.mE3efOHkv8fltkWrAcuS34G7OHYjDC4e9CXGUAI42Fw/s/2950175210/br/154440521759-l "Read about this article")

## Republicans push partisan school board races
Republicans in the House and Senate chambers are pushing legislation that would turn Indiana’s school board races partisan. I believe that politics do not belong in classrooms—these races should focus on a candidate’s commitment to our schools and educating our students, rather than on party politics. I will continue focusing on the real issues in our schools, including lagging attainment, uncompetitive teacher pay, and eliminating burdensome textbook taxes for our families.

clean_body: Indiana Senate Democratic News | | | | "Indiana Senate Democrats" "Twitter" "Facebook"mailto:senator.hunley@iga.in.gov "Email" "Visit Me Online" | | "Insendems Newsroom" Senate expands contraceptive access, passes housing protections, plans to hear SB 233 This week, I was proud to vote for bills that expand access to long-acting reversible contraception (IUDs) and that protect renters from negligent landlords. Common sense bills like these go a long way for Hoosier families, who deserve safety, protection, and the ability to live and plan their lives freely. I'm also excited to say that my bill, SB 233—which creates a task force to study road and infrastructure safety—is scheduled for a hearing tomorrow. I will continue to support bills that offer Hoosiers more freedom and more security. "Read about this article" | "Insendems Newsroom" Republicans push partisan school board races Republicans in the House and Senate chambers are pushing legislation that would turn Indiana’s school board races partisan. I believe that politics do not belong in classrooms—these races should focus on a candidate’s commitment to our schools and educating our students, rather than on party politics. I will continue focusing on the real issues in our schools, including lagging attainment, uncompetitive teacher pay, and eliminating burdensome textbook taxes for our families. Friend,

name: Katie Porter
subject: Environmental racism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I visited Southeast LA cities to listen to and speak with local leaders about the urgent need to stick up for these communities and hold special interests accountable.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)
Polluters often target communities of color, unfairly burdening families with toxic water, air, and soil.**I visited Southeast LA cities to listen to and speak with local leaders about the urgent need to stick up for these communities and hold special interests accountable.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230213-1?refcode=em20230213-1&refcode2=17665_3422442_Zk7AzS&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)
Black, Latino and other communities of color have been targeted by big polluters because they’ve been blocked from having political power. **Let's call it what it is: environmental racism.**
Parts of LA County have some of the worst air pollution in the country. Parks, schools, and homes have toxic metal embedded in their soil. Freeways were built and industrial sites were chosen because corporations thought residents wouldn’t be able to oppose them.
Corporations target these communities, and then the same corporations block any attempt by Washington to hold them accountable. With a single call to Joe Manchin or any number of Big Oil funded politicians, the fossil fuel industry has successfully watered down environmental legislation.
**I’ve spent my career standing up to special interests deemed too powerful to take on—and delivering for Californians.** Unlike other candidates in this race, I’ve never taken corporate PAC money. I can’t be bought, and in the Senate I’ll fight to pass the Green New Deal, adequately fund the EPA, and pass environmental legislation that doesn’t leave any community behind.
I’m proud to be running a truly people-powered campaign, which means I can only continue meeting with people from every part of the state with your support. **[Consider making a $15 donation today to help power the fight for a better future for _every_ Californian.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230213-1?refcode=em20230213-1&refcode2=17665_3422442_Zk7AzS&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230213-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF13_1_SLA_20230213_V1_F&refcode2=17665_3422442_Zk7AzS&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF13_1_SLA_20230213_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=17665_3422442_Zk7AzS&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=17665%2E3422442%2EZk7AzS)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Busy Weekend in the U.S. Skies
body:
Things are ramping up with China No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qhdchy-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday![ Check out the results of the CaucusRoom Straw Poll.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-y/) Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-t/) **A Third Balloon** It was a busy weekend for U.S. fighter jet pilots when a [**third balloon-type object** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-i/)was spotted and [**airspace over Montana was temporarily restricted**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-d/) Officials believe they know **[what the objects are](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-h/).** **Ten Spending Cuts**
## The **[ten spending cuts Republicans want in a debt limit deal](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-k/)**[ __](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-u/)\- including ending Biden's student loan forgiveness, slashing 'woke waste' and getting back unspent COVID pandemic funds.
**Fetterman Hears Voices** Sometimes when **[PA Senator Fetterman hears voices they sound like the adults in the animated 'Peanuts' cartoons](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-o/)**, in which a muted trombone was used to give them indecipherable language. **Time's Up** Elon Musk's **[SpaceX is restricting Ukraine from using its satellite](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-x/)s** to fight Russia after providing internet service since February of last year. **2024 GOP Race** **[Nikki Haley will announce her entry into the race for the GOP nomination](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-m/)** for President this week. It may open up the floodgates for others to jump into the race. **He Gets Us** A group of **[Jesus fans and followers spent $20 Million on Super Bowl ads](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-c/)** spreading their message to mover 100 million football fans.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* David is **[great at multitasking](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-a/)!**
* Ralph explains the difference between**[Hunter's and Joe's laptops](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-f/).**
* Angela has some**[bad news about the Super Bowl](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-z/).**
* Duane has an explanation for **[why eggs are so expensive](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-v/).**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhdchy-trhiujldw-w/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qhdchy-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yh) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qhdchy-trhiujldw-yk/)
